Peter, make no mistake...

* You can see that by the way they’re pushing Critical Race Theory on our kids, to teach them America is a racist country.
* You can see it with their out-of-control government spending, including paying people to not work.
* You can see it in their complete disregard for human life.

We cannot allow these radical policies to ruin our country. That’s what I’m pledging to do now. I’m launching the DEFEND OUR FREEDOM FUND to combat liberal destruction now and need your help to raise $25,000 before our end-of-month deadline on July 31st to stand strong for our nation.

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

Friend, let’s put this in perspective.
**_ _**
The price of gas is up _**50%**_ , the price of housing is up **_25%_ ,****** and inflation is at _**5%**_ and climbing.

Fellow American,

The end of July is coming up fast and [**I need your help to make sure we hit the ground running.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ed8b126707e438b9d3e581b9e6d53ab&_e=6e6ygARlIpFlie-S8-BXj6IxF2Op-Bq3nXTAPRboB_an65F6vkPIQJZD6ywPcIRl0B6Ydsj2P9qvLJHCn_WfjqU65nB4bTgtq8J7udshmMdLfAvo8C3BqwnT7knWFDHCz8iRPHj0nNToxYaMEcTc9PbwSdvakOJ9b4nG7-i0TRPUmgCnyCLSNLew69mn2WUvDyMUol8emMK_trbfAAYz7ay9n5EISE_d0TmmkwFqxQlUkLDoluDt-uRvVORfQq292M1p5UqMErlmjzfvy4K5tXyWxMYmUWbHsDj743XA8fy0lq76tpyFJZyARvX9Wkd39Qh6a4tIIfrmWzun3pXKa9TqCk_LfaTF1lp6A6JUcBZhtPgu_zFmiKDquyU0weZUhtE1FfxL8kP0q6tbLHcHYQ%3D%3D)

This will be my first deadline since announcing my run against Ilhan Omar, and everyone from Mainstream Media to Liberal Super PACs are watching to see if we can compete with the millions Ilhan Omar has raised from the radical Left to prop up her campaign.

**I’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 before midnight on Saturday.** I know with the support of folks just like you, we can send a clear message to the Left.

**Let’s give them something to fear,
Fellow American. **

Let’s show the Left every Republican from across this great nation supports a patriot instead of a hate-spewing radical like Ilhan Omar. [**We can prove that we have what it takes to kick Omar out of Congress and to get our nation back to pursuing the American Dream but need your support before midnight on Saturday.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ed8b126707e438b9d3e581b9e6d53ab&_e=6e6ygARlIpFlie-S8-BXj6IxF2Op-Bq3nXTAPRboB_an65F6vkPIQJZD6ywPcIRl0B6Ydsj2P9qvLJHCn_WfjqU65nB4bTgtq8J7udshmMdLfAvo8C3BqwnT7knWFDHCz8iRPHj0nNToxYaMEcTc9PbwSdvakOJ9b4nG7-i0TRPUmgCnyCLSNLew69mn2WUvFXxFcG5JDgXQ32IsNGV8LZkDcjv0cPiAm4ne7sTbIk-_hA6Q3zBKZb4x9-zlOXssWznQVSrwYq5hB17N1Uvc12WHu1grvn4sJ7xVt4gMxam_Si50irLEUv9FA4ZHmfgX4VLz8wu0OSAkA8rQ7NudNdUii4j8I7--9M_7A2TkiyYcIm1XsFgG47m82YxQ_ajFptM8xaPi4aHOrGOH8LJIsQ%3D%3D)

[** HELP KICK ILHAN OMAR OUT OF CONGRESS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ed8b126707e438b9d3e581b9e6d53ab&_e=6e6ygARlIpFlie-S8-BXj6IxF2Op-Bq3nXTAPRboB_an65F6vkPIQJZD6ywPcIRl0B6Ydsj2P9qvLJHCn_WfjqU65nB4bTgtq8J7udshmMdLfAvo8C3BqwnT7knWFDHCz8iRPHj0nNToxYaMEcTc9PbwSdvakOJ9b4nG7-i0TRPUmgCnyCLSNLew69mn2WUvKltmKFV9R9pD6YM_yMtsA60bshPu2Gb9FjgG3vq-8LqVbb93riKtwAflI9ImEVjDFWfh7dFBuZp5BIM41GfD4bvxe6jYjL3dLY3jmeGT1l-D9TJarn90ZNUZ_xPxHpIQL3j-41WEzUdwB6izJu2gwubNMejdlplb0nLvcfxhZH2LLFRxUVcUWXGe4wlJSiWvjs4oM1P9b1Lugu7JWgTXMw%3D%3D)
**_Help me take the fight to Ilhan Omar_** , this is already going to be a tough race, so please don’t sit on the sidelines while I’m in this uphill battle, I can’t make it without your help.

**It takes a community of patriots to stand up to tyranny** , and when a member of Congress like Ilhan Omar praises protests that burn our communities to the ground, then you know we all must make an impact.

**Fellow American, any help you can give – even $5 or $10 – will help us hit our first deadline.**

Republican control of Congress will rest on winning this very seat, and if we can take it from Omar, then we can ensure that goal is within reach.

So Fellow American, help me make a strong showing for my first deadline. [**Let’s take the fight to Omar.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ed8b126707e438b9d3e581b9e6d53ab&_e=6e6ygARlIpFlie-S8-BXj6IxF2Op-Bq3nXTAPRboB_an65F6vkPIQJZD6ywPcIRl0B6Ydsj2P9qvLJHCn_WfjqU65nB4bTgtq8J7udshmMdLfAvo8C3BqwnT7knWFDHCz8iRPHj0nNToxYaMEcTc9PbwSdvakOJ9b4nG7-i0TRPUmgCnyCLSNLew69mn2WUvX4VWlMP_bPoh9ZFwIbj6HxcJ3HDv2V1nJSdWnuQfth-iAfV2pOQmY2PBTpCjHHgF_lk7QEmuJBbxykzrTZCYs3AccxOl1gVeOMDBWX7GH0INtwhSQ0h6ljiFCqu90Bc_FLVPmqC-L1J_eUjBdOGO1hEtrHXX_Uijf45bZIH3LzWC_H4efnXZ0gfeQXtl5C9BEzgfmoe3j1QO6G_jJwFzrw%3D%3D)

Friend,

I have something for you.

I've been thinking back on all of my EPIC rallies over the years, and I came across some photos. One, in particular, is my absolute favorite and when I saw it, _I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it._

But, I didn't want to send you JUST any photograph of me - _I wanted to make it special._ I asked my team to put together a list of my _most LOYAL supporters so that I could give them a personalized, signed photo._

clean_body: Friend, I have something for you. I've been thinking back on all of my EPIC rallies over the years, and I came across some photos. One, in particular, is my absolute favorite and when I saw it, I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it. But, I didn't want to send you JUST any photograph of me - I wanted to make it special. I asked my team to put together a list of my most LOYAL supporters so that I could give them a personalized, signed photo. Of course, YOU were at the VERY TOP of that list, Friend. I only have a limited amount of signed photos and I really want YOU to have one. - Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 - |

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Well...that figures. You'll want to know this...
disclaimer_text: paid for by the corporations who represent their interests in Congress
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGru8Q&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EBrUTK&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/1b8c89bc-a4f4-4814-83b2-2e2058e4737e.png]

I looked at the reports and thought...

"...well, that figures." My team and I reviewed the FEC reports for Dan Newhouse and our other opponents and what we found was disturbing but not surprising.

Dan Newhouse raised over $200,000+ in the last reporting quarter. Any guesses on where $113,000 of the money came from?

Special interest money and corporate PACs. Specifically, companies like Walmart, Amazon, Google, and others that directly benefited from the shutdown that put small business owners, their employees, and entrepreneurs out of business.

While you were shut down barely able to survive they raked inMILLIONSof dollars and posted record profits.

Some of those profits went directly to Dan Newhouse's campaign and other political cowards who simply vote the way they're told and did NOTHINGto end the shutdown.

Where were these people last year when we were on the front lines holding rallies, fighting for freedom and liberty, and waking up the electorate? They were quietly huddled in their offices sucking their thumbs. Dan Newhouse did nothing to help you. Nothing to help the farmers. Nothing to help families struggling to homeschool their children. Nothing for the workers who lost their jobs.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/7acf5ea6-1256-4671-b39c-189d7b8b7ef1.jpg]
What was his solution? Vote to support big bailouts and stimulus payments he KNEWwould be spent inside corporations like Walmart, adding to their bottom line.

I don't know about you, but I'm tired. I'm just tired of seeing hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign money go to candidates who are bought and paid for by the corporations who represent their interests in Congress.

Where did the rest of Newhouse's money come from? Mostly out of state donors and friends he's made in DC and other areas. He's tapped into the anti-Trump RINOs across the country. They know he's in trouble.

Over 99% of our contributions have come from folks just like you in Washington State. YOUare the only special interest group I care about. We raised $3.3 million in contributions with NO special interest money in the last cycle. We ran one heck of a race and sparked a movement inside Washington and this cycle we are doing it again.

This election season, our team has increased our fundraising each consecutive month since I announced my candidacy in April 2021 and we're beating expectations again. From November 2019 through June 2021 my team has raised more money than the previous month with zero help from special interests or party insiders.

With three days to go, this is where we stand:We are only short 67 individual donors of hitting our goal and only short of hitting our July funding goal by $7,438 in total contributions. But, we are still beating expectations. As Mr. Trump says, "It's good to be underestimated."

I hate asking for money, but I need your support to continue this campaign and bridge the money gap Dan Newhouse has through special interest dollars. We overcame those same gaps last year against 34 opponents (whom we beat by at least 2 to 1) and with your help, we'll overcome them again. Let's go win.

Can I count on you? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SixFXF&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECZItFw&]

Loren

PS: I'll brief you on how we did tomorrow afternoon.If everyone receiving this email contributed $100 one time--we'd raise over $1 million. The potential to outraise Newhouse is there! We can win. We WILLwin!

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SixFvq&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIr5t8M&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SixF2o&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVtgzaB&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SixFew&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ey83JNZ&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BGru8Q&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EymdBEZ&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BGru8Q&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtsHz1k&pt=change_details] at any time.
Powered by: https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=RDxFI&u=Q96gS&z=Et6yzPx&

body:
Spoiler Alert: It's a disaster! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [6 Months into the Biden Presidency - How's it Going?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-j/)
We're 6 months into the Biden presidency. What kind of job is he doing? You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### ["There's Nothing More Permanent than a Temporary Government Program"](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats are in a race to enact as much of their liberal agenda as possible before they lose control of Congress in the next election. Unfortunately, once you expand government, or get people hooked on free stuff paid for by other people's taxes, it's hard to ever get rid of. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Democrats Find Another Issue to Exploit](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats continue to exploit race, in election after election - and get away with it. Even though the facts are not on their side. We take a look at those facts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Democrats Reap What They Sow](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlulurhl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats have been pushing "defund the police" for the last year or so. Now they're trying to say "no, it's actually Republicans who want to defund police." Will it work? Read about the battle in this week's blog. Read about the battle in this week's blog. | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. |

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: DEMAND Election Integrity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
America deserves better. PeterDemocrats are fighting back HARD against every attempt at un-rigging our elections, and fixing the corruption that plagued us in 2020.We need to show them that we are NOT BACKING DOWN in this fight! [**Will you help me save our elections?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [ACT NOW >> SAVE OUR ELECTIONS](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) I just formally joined the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress. We decided to create this new power center in D.C. because we HEAR our constituents who are demanding answers and solutions.Instead of actually fixing our elections, the Democrats are taking us in two separate WRONG directions. First, they're playing politics with a one-sided, pre-determined investigative committee to _distract_ away from voter fraud. Second, their legislative proposal is to BAN Voter ID, and nationalize our elections. Our caucus is going to proactively educate Americans about election security, advocate around the country for reforms that strengthen security in every state and precinct, and pass new laws to protect the ballot box and restore voter confidence. Now it's YOUR turn to step up!With your help, we will **STOP** Big Tech liberal billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg from dumping their dark money into our elections.And together, we can **STOP** radical activist judges and governors like Tony Evers from steamrolling and hijacking our election laws.Finally, we can **STOP **the Democrats' **Corrupt Politicians Act (HR1), where they're trying to nationalize our election and BAN Voter ID! **We only have one chance to stop it, standing right in front of us: We have to **TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!** Please, take a moment to [join us](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) in this fight for our country's future.-Scott Fitzgerald [RUSH $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [RUSH $50](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-i/) [RUSH $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [RUSH $250](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-b/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmjitl-ahkdjtlkr-n/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031446:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031445:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031447:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031448:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031449:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58031450:JkYy9tlpN:m:1:3253819041:5A2FFCAFF9463A5028650181240F25C9:r)
---|---|---

name: Greater Georgia
subject: BREAKING: GREATER GEORGIA FILES AMICUS BRIEF SUPPORTING S.B. 202 AGAINST DOJ'S FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, JULY 29, 2021
BREAKING: GREATER GEORGIA FILES AMICUS BRIEF SUPPORTING S.B. 202 AGAINST DOJ'S FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT
ATLANTA - Greater Georgia has filed an amicus brief in support of the State of Georgia's response to the recent suit [filed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQUXg7PMNZ-UTBMmEHTppzoiFgilMdoUkt3PxsLekQLYyKtw64iLxF2GqPip8b9T2VfjnBJ9E5aI7Zqdkb2duskDjm9jBL4UO9FSPbmp5Xpy75kwkXFY-G5MRWaoabwzaL8jMFWNa2ZfX2R4q1LPyDmdufSqj9Zn6tHzEwhYp8DUXpeF4lORRxOTR7UiZY4olLsqUgUG7MIbGTDpgpHtkIMHDKEVvbbVdcugWfEpms8=&c=Q__tigBwfU0VGfVU0vN9XAhGgkXLjGodMww1d33-ct8Ad686x1sHSA==&ch=ZsMwHhKvgAs0JEriu0VQTV2RmNZRAwBSeDHwM_w_jksKbR2546JP6g==) by the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). The DOJ's suit against Georgia seeks to overturn the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202), a law that actually [expands](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQUXg7PMNZ-UTBMmEHTppzoiFgilMdoUkt3PxsLekQLYyKtw64iLxLa86HIJLAlsxRQ2462bG8DQ3L3VdCnv-k1axTnLB0m5_Nyu7a0U52aNkI-HgEnVDMxwGCFeQSGJ4e0SuLP6y9UtxjMS65As2xJkJYeqi0qP-dvwPhtDhLm-3y4SI1cNFZgXRI7mtQRfpA3C39SdohsGH2SklgMZ0qg9e-msUzbwHHwbJF-EutPDIo2dvSmfAw==&c=Q__tigBwfU0VGfVU0vN9XAhGgkXLjGodMww1d33-ct8Ad686x1sHSA==&ch=ZsMwHhKvgAs0JEriu0VQTV2RmNZRAwBSeDHwM_w_jksKbR2546JP6g==) ballot access. A federal judge has already [dismissed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQUXg7PMNZ-UTBMmEHTppzoiFgilMdoUkt3PxsLekQLYyKtw64iLxG75wC4p60crnCjaPXupSpIg61N2jN3zSQmiHD44Q2cDGXQyRkjBra4sjCv7lY3EZwxHbL3J1L0L_ePoiGJmyA_WBhKNuh1GwRal1IgVp-irPZES-_fLo17eowB7ElJc2FPn0KGjtO1CoE7hNFtM7rFVhrGx-_6B-7GOvOx0L3oRGHp385y_sAd8_Q1jFozxEX9RKRmv5K8mIdIRJA9EqxrAruM_IpU09g==&c=Q__tigBwfU0VGfVU0vN9XAhGgkXLjGodMww1d33-ct8Ad686x1sHSA==&ch=ZsMwHhKvgAs0JEriu0VQTV2RmNZRAwBSeDHwM_w_jksKbR2546JP6g==) a separate lawsuit against the state that was seeking to invalidate parts of S.B. 202.
"As the conservative voter mobilization organization in Georgia, we are on the frontlines defending S.B. 202 and fighting for more accessible, secure elections for all Georgians. The DOJ's cynical lawsuit is a baseless political stunt engineered by Joe Biden and Stacey Abrams to attack a law that actually expands ballot access," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "We've seen firsthand the loss of voter confidence across our state after unprecedented, inconsistent changes were made to our elections in 2020. Thanks to S.B. 202, Georgians have more access to securely cast a legal ballot, with more safeguards than ever before. We will continue to stand up to Washington's partisan assault on election integrity to ensure more voices - and votes - are heard."
Greater Georgia's brief challenges the merits of the DOJ's case by pointing out the following facts about S.B. 202:

* EXPANDED ACCESS
* Georgia has one of the most open and accessible voting systems in the United States, and the Election Integrity Act actually expands voters' access to the ballot box.

* DROP BOXES
* The Election Integrity Act codifies ballot drop boxes for the first time, creates a uniform system for their implementation, and ensures that they are secure.

* UNIFORMITY
* Changes to elections during the pandemic created widespread confusion, distrust, and poorly implemented changes that lacked uniformity. The Election Integrity Act provides uniformity and transparency in its implementation across all 159 counties.

* ABSENTEE BALLOTS
* The Election Integrity Act strengthens the integrity of absentee ballots by preventing mass mail-outs of absentee ballot requests and prohibiting outside groups from filling out applications for voters.
* It also replaces the subjective signature verification process with the requirement for valid identification.

* OUT-OF-PRECINCT VOTING
* The Election Integrity Act limits the use of provisional ballots for out-of-precinct voters and instead requires these voters be directed to their correct precinct. This process cuts down on excessive provisional ballots, delays, and inaccuracies in election reporting.

To read the full brief, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jQUXg7PMNZ-UTBMmEHTppzoiFgilMdoUkt3PxsLekQLYyKtw64iLxF2GqPip8b9T9aG34wpUdUiWEVkn429Uf1q90w3z4AhFQ1EQH-SYM3H2U4kwFh8X6aw_zF-baYKdj-ddLL9WmcqmmIqv8KleGBE2PU4sWI70vPiQi2PIJq-872Qv5eGd68yxXlPOoh3xzWY7KDx4rmPawIqWcUN2e-7kWMJCrVNMVepyJazFVhY=&c=Q__tigBwfU0VGfVU0vN9XAhGgkXLjGodMww1d33-ct8Ad686x1sHSA==&ch=ZsMwHhKvgAs0JEriu0VQTV2RmNZRAwBSeDHwM_w_jksKbR2546JP6g==).

name: Roger Misso
subject: We elected Raphael Warnock. Then terrorists stormed the Capitol.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Remember January? On the 5th, we celebrated the incredible victories of our friends and now Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff. Then, on the very next day, terrorists incited by Donald Trump stormed the US Capitol Building, resulting in the deaths of Capitol police officers on one of the darkest days in American history.

Earlier this week, we watched the [_emotional testimony_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/R3jsMa0a0NmRoUaMTLR0LBLfXkBByxM8hWvbq3R-DqM=) of four Capitol police officers who survived the attack on our Capitol while Republicans lined up to [_deny the insurrection_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/iOHYa3XiQwm7kNtpQV65EOmfuLDrrfJD9i3gnsD5WPc=) and _[obstruct its investigation](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/IA4jE70zLRNT_db0iYrxf8sIao1HME-G_u73RzS4rUM=)_. Make no mistake: [_**unless we elect leaders of character and integrity to Congress,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/r8jaSeeyTilFkDzfAI5phFjVDSu4LKIWAD4b3NVnlS8=) an attack like this will happen again.

[_**That 's why it's so important for us to have Senator Warnock's back again next November.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/r8jaSeeyTilFkDzfAI5phFjVDSu4LKIWAD4b3NVnlS8=) You might have seen _**[our endorsement of his re-election campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/r8jaSeeyTilFkDzfAI5phFjVDSu4LKIWAD4b3NVnlS8=)**_ this weekend. He comes from a military family and has stood up for the 600,000+ veterans that call Georgia home. Now, more than ever, [_**we need to keep him in the Senate!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/r8jaSeeyTilFkDzfAI5phFjVDSu4LKIWAD4b3NVnlS8=)

We want to make sure Sen. Warnock has what he needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/7eZS3ZwhKw70Mlb1DRe4Qpd8YySBGuvFCdnddy6lxZw=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give Senator Warnock a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/7eZS3ZwhKw70Mlb1DRe4Qpd8YySBGuvFCdnddy6lxZw=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/7eZS3ZwhKw70Mlb1DRe4Qpd8YySBGuvFCdnddy6lxZw=)

Veterans won Georgia - TWICE. Let's do it a third time by coming together to [_**re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/r8jaSeeyTilFkDzfAI5phFjVDSu4LKIWAD4b3NVnlS8=)

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/0CrAXJztvd9CQ8PONncmpaJhXkk--Kb_ADtz6NLQDbs=)_

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/_rnmUGOnL2RJr6WEMsDoxME_0jMjCkQ75wjOohsdXPo= "https://act.myngp.com/el/Drn8_tKc0Sjsa0Xoe3uySJExOb_lIgeBCBt1PYHtF-w=/_rnmUGOnL2RJr6WEMsDoxME_0jMjCkQ75wjOohsdXPo=").

Peter, Dr. Fauci lied.

The NIH funded research in Wuhan that could have led to viruses like COVID-19.

That's what I told Fox News and it needs to be heard by everyone across this country.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

**That’s why we CANNOT fall short of Mark’s fundraising goal this month. But right now we still need to raise another $7,886. So I’m coming to you for help.**

Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. body:
and now he has $44 million in cash on hand (!!)
|
---

| | **Ron DeSantis ' political committee rakes in nearly $5.6 million...**
_\-- Florida Politics_ Friend,

With the backing of national Republican donors and the support of Donald Trump's base, Gov. Ron DeSantis has built a war chest of nearly **_$44 million_**. Gov. DeSantis's extreme backers will stop at nothing to ensure he has the resources to keep Florida red.

**[Going up against the national Republican Party machine isn't going to be easy, so we need this grassroots community to step up in a big way. Every dollar will make a difference towards defeating Gov. DeSantis in 2022 and helping elect Charlie Crist. Can you pitch in RIGHT NOW?](https://act.myngp.com/el/AOfonslRHB6f3y0R2Ubp7w==/IB5Yj1tq-IXlAHeixamALg==?refcode=20210726_f_1_fl&amount=25)** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Gov. DeSantis cares solely about his own political prospects -- which means every decision he makes is meant to help _his future political career_ (not Floridians).

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: MAJOR Campaign Announcement
body:
This is an absolute game changer.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m2aVQz4j5q4wVWW3rR3DrK5WVRnlPogiY-YNNl7d02E_smNZlyxWWLw6bOAkiD9PY8-HvRELdioQKwyHETn0d2kylK0xMbg90bjR1y2byG4PeC4bzCpKj83KHUTW1MU8yOlA3YkQ8fgwzLja4CsKfA==&c=OCmjE37oRYLnoXRM8KvRqJT7M0F2D5TNrutBUggu8HYr7oMvstCXAg==&ch=--a8S69Apu1IER4_Y7e-GIATXoMxd72lrg-RSu65XxRdYM7nb5r4Xw==)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
We have some major news.
As you know, we finished the second quarter with the most money in the bank of any candidate for Senate.
Today, we reserved $9.9 million in broadcast and cable television time for the 2022 election cycle, with $2.9 million reserved in 2021 alone.
That means we'll be on the air, talking to voters, from tomorrow until the May 2022 primary.
[You can watch our new ad by clicking on the link below](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m2aVQz4j5q4wVWW3rR3DrK5WVRnlPogiY-YNNl7d02E_smNZlyxWWPY5CL5ju-EHGwq0HruKbkPikoiIegduZSR7AUCup7CL-mlsantVIOZNo0uwNDZBYFM9YtrOzEm3O4_h5_Wc7mbHWwKc5v_5aVPsm0LMhraBgHLSQC_EsI_zXT8hv-NtIQ==&c=OCmjE37oRYLnoXRM8KvRqJT7M0F2D5TNrutBUggu8HYr7oMvstCXAg==&ch=--a8S69Apu1IER4_Y7e-GIATXoMxd72lrg-RSu65XxRdYM7nb5r4Xw==), but you should know what led to this decision.
This is the most important race of our lifetimes. The Left threatens the very fabric of America: Runaway spending, inflation, a crisis at the border, the federal takeover over elections, unelected bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives, and a culture that seeks to divide us along racial lines.
That's why we're making this commitment to victory.
When you watch the ad, remember one thing:
Our message isn't about me, it's about we. We believe in America. We need to come together, stand proud, and fight to preserve this great nation. We are calling on the people of Ohio to join our team.
Join us.
No one will work harder for Ohio. No one will put more on the line for Ohio.
This ad campaign is just the start. We're building an unprecedented grassroots team and a relentless travel schedule to talk with activists and voters. Ohio deserves a conservative outsider who is blunt, fearless, and unafraid.
That's going to take resources and support.
[Join Team Gibbons. Make a contribution. Become a Team Gibbons leader in your community. clean_body: This is an absolute game changer. | | | | | | == | Fellow Patriot, We have some major news. As you know, we finished the second quarter with the most money in the bank of any candidate for Senate. Today, we reserved $9.9 million in broadcast and cable television time for the 2022 election cycle, with $2.9 million reserved in 2021 alone. That means we'll be on the air, talking to voters, from tomorrow until the May 2022 primary. ==, but you should know what led to this decision. This is the most important race of our lifetimes. The Left threatens the very fabric of America: Runaway spending, inflation, a crisis at the border, the federal takeover over elections, unelected bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives, and a culture that seeks to divide us along racial lines. That's why we're making this commitment to victory. When you watch the ad, remember one thing: Our message isn't about me, it's about we. We believe in America. We need to come together, stand proud, and fight to preserve this great nation. We are calling on the people of Ohio to join our team. Join us. No one will work harder for Ohio. No one will put more on the line for Ohio. This ad campaign is just the start. We're building an unprecedented grassroots team and a relentless travel schedule to talk with activists and voters. Ohio deserves a conservative outsider who is blunt, fearless, and unafraid. That's going to take resources and support. == That's the message of our ad. We believe. | == | Let's get to work. Because winning isn't everything, it's the only thing. | | Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | == | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | == == | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: I'm worried, team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

We’re less than three days away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I’m getting worried. I just ran the numbers, and we’re still $8,423 short of our goal.

Before you read any further, I’ll cut to the chase: if you can help close the gap, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom?refcode=thurs]

Every moment he spends in the governor’s office, Ron DeSantis poses a greater threat to Floridians. Right now, we’re living with the consequences of his failed leadership on COVID-19.

We know Floridians deserve better than DeSantis, but stopping him next year won’t be easy. Meeting our fundraising goals now means we’ll have the resources to defeat DeSantis and his special interest friends.

We’re running out of time, friends, so I’m hoping you can step up with a contribution of $5 or more. Please click here to chip in now and help us reach our goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom?refcode=thurs]

I know we’re all on the same page about this: through his actions and his inactions, Ron DeSantis is dangerous. It’s on all of us to stop him next year.

Thanks for standing with Nikki.

Stefanie Sass

Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They want to destroy my life, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But I will never stop fighting.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.
---
_But I want you to know something ... I have ZERO regrets._
---
**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**
---
_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034998:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034999:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58035000:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58035001:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58035002:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---
**[DEFEND RUDY - CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)**
---
There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58034997:JAMIOtlrN:m:1:3253819041:E0D88B601AD23470E32103A88DCC1896:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Jan 6 prisoners - what are they hiding?

body:
Peter -- Why are Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats covering "it"
up?
First, Nancy Pelosi refuses to allow America
First Republicans on the January 6 Commission.
Then, the DOJ refused to answer our letters
and calls demanding answers, and pro-Pelosi activists flanked us
at our Press Conference.
And just now, my colleagues and I were deemed
"trespassers" and kicked out of the D.C. Correctional Facility
where the January 6 prisoners are being held.
HELP MTG SUE PELOSI
EMERGENCY DONATE $17.76
WATCH:

There are reports of assault, cruelty,
fractured bones, prisoners held without trial. . . this is
outrageous!
Members of Congress need to conduct
oversight. The American people deserve answers!
I'm going to expose what Nancy Pelosi, the
FBI, and any other Deep State actor knew about January 6.
And I'm going to start by holding Nancy
Pelosi accountable.
Will you help me Sue Pelosi?
Emergency Donate $17.76 right away.

I'll keep you updated.
Marjorie Taylor Greene

for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**FIRST:** Our team learned that Donald Trump is coming to NY-17 for a fundraiser at a wealthy Republican donor’s house _one week from today_. Even after Trump incited the January 6th insurrection, his most loyal supporters are still sticking by him - not great.
**THEN:** Yesterday, we reached out to announce our $14,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Hitting our financial goals is always important, but this one is especially meaningful - because we want to prove to Trump and his allies that hate has no home in NY-17.
**NOW:** We’re asking if you can pitch in $5, or any amount you can afford, to help us hit our goal and send a strong message to Donald Trump.

I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. clean_body: Trump-Endorsed Sen. Tim Scott made it official. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Did you hear the HUGE NEWS , Peter? Trump-Endorsed Republican Senator Tim Scott has officially announced his campaign for re-election to the United States Senate! and we’re working around the clock to build a grassroots team that can take on and DEFEAT the Democrats. Our most up-to-date records show that you’re one of the most dedicated and loyal Republicans in Englewood, FL, so we’re reaching out to you before anyone else... Photo Credit: Twitter (@votetimscott) | | | | | | Top Republicans across the country are proudly standing by Tim Scott’s side: President Donald Trump endorses Tim Scott Senator Lindsey Graham endorses Tim Scott Senator Ted Cruz endorses Tim Scott Senator Marco Rubio endorses Tim Scott Senator Tom Cotton endorses Tim Scott Senator Joni Ernst endorses Tim Scott Rep. Kevin McCarthy endorses Tim Scott Rep. Elise Stefanik endorses Tim Scott Rep. Byron Donalds endorses Tim Scott Rep. Nancy Mace endorses Tim Scott John James endorses Tim Scott Herschel Walker endorses Tim Scott Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel endorses Tim Scott But there’s one more Leading Republican whose name we need to add to the Official Supporters List, Peter -- and that’s yours... | Thank you. subject: Raskin: Jan. 6 attackers are “fascist traitors”

body:
|

| | Peter, Jamie Raskin didn't have time to mince words when calling out those who attacked our democracy on January 6. **“Those who attacked [Capitol police officers] ... are fascist traitors to our country and will be remembered forever as fascist traitors."** Next week will be nearly SEVEN MONTHS since the January 6 insurrection, and, despite mountains of evidence, public statements, and live broadcast footage of the insurrection, the fascist GOP is scrambling to lay blame for that dark day at the feet of the Democrats. Republicans are only trying to distract Americans from the GOP's involvement in and support for that attack on our democracy. Make no mistake about it, the GOP's messaging is winning over voters in key House districts across the country, particularly in districts with our most vulnerable House members on the front line. Quite simply, Peter, the very core foundation of our democracy depends on our ability to defend these Democrats. | **[DONATE TO FIGHT FASCISTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33183332/298098241/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210729_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYTg4NDQyLThhZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CntwGWkep9YRrKW1tEBOHe7I-15WfBsD-VXOUprMaWA=)**

Chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can today if you believe that keeping our democracy depends on keeping our majority in 2022 and you're willing to fight for that.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33183333/298098242/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210729_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYTg4NDQyLThhZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CntwGWkep9YRrKW1tEBOHe7I-15WfBsD-VXOUprMaWA=)**

So many folks were chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to support Martin’s work. But in the past couple of weeks, our fundraising numbers have dipped and we’ve hit what a lot of folks call a summer slump. We're no longer on track to meet our end-of-month goal before our deadline in just two days. So, here’s what needs to happen to close this gap: 1. Either more people need to pitch in right now; 2. Or, folks can donate just a little bit more than usual. Will you be one of the folks we're counting on to pitch in $10 or even $25 to help us catch up? name: Laura Loomer
subject: They’re cancelling the 2nd Amendment
body:
Here in Florida, we're known as a state that respects individual liberties.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw) Here in Florida, we're known as a state that respects individual liberties.

But Democrats eager to make a name for themselves are still able to strip away our individual rights.

[**It 's happened to me and I ask that you join me in fighting back.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)

Nikki Fried is Florida's Commissioner of Agriculture.

Nikki is in charge of ensuring the "wholesomeness of food" in the state - **but she 's also in charge of issuing concealed carry permits and maintaining Florida's background check database**.

My ability to possess a firearm was stripped in 2019 for purely political reasons - while I'm suing to get my rights back, I'm also running for Congress to stop gun-grabbing Radical Leftists like Nikki Fried. [**Help me win.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)
This week, Fried, who is also running for Governor of Florida against Ron DeSantis, took her partisan extremism even further and announced she is immediately suspending the carry permits for 22 individuals who were at the Capitol on January 6th.

Fried is ignoring Due Process and stripping rights of Americans who have not been convicted of a crime. These 22 individuals are simply suspects. They haven't even been charged!

This is not what our Founders intended - **because the same thing happened to them. They were stripped of their ability to defend themselves as a way to limit their power and influence**.

And they didn't take it lightly, particularly, the "Son of Thunder" Patrick Henry.
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)
In April of 1775, a day after the Battles of Lexington and Concord, the Royal Governor of Virginia, Lord Dunmore, seized the gunpowder of the colonists.

**If you know anything about Patrick Henry, you know that he wasn 't a man to mess with.**

If Henry were in politics today, he'd be called an extremist or worse, a domestic terrorist. The GOP Establishment of today would have nothing to do with the man.

But Virginians loved him and when Lord Dunmore stripped their ability to fight, Henry gathered a group of men (against the advice of the establishment politicians of the day) and marched on Williamsburg to demand the return of the gun powder - and they were paid 330 British Pounds in exchange.

No shots were fired. No violence was sparked.

But that didn't stop Lord Dunmore from fleeing the Governor's mansion to a waiting British ship. Then the coward, from the safety of a war ship, issued an order charging Henry with extortion.

**Like Lord Dunmore, Nikki Fried is also a coward.**

She is stripping the Second Amendment Rights of Americans for political gain and to obtain higher office in her campaign for Governor of Florida.
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)
America needs more Patrick Henrys.

While I could only hope to compare to Henry's intelligence and bravery, his life offers a roadmap to save a nation from tyranny.

[**Help me get to Congress so I can follow Patrick Henry 's example and bravely stand up to any power that threatens us.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Hg2iXPKAF33LxN763F24Z2cA/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Photo credit: Matt A.J.

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/W3EVwzLUwMmlWrTSmLzUAw)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: You deserve the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33186747/298110782/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTkyOTBlMS05MmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWifHjphXNm_3rAIvWYoIBeQZnW_CG5Eoc2u_x5Cn5g=&emci=020bf8ab-8df0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=719290e1-92f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **On January 6th, our democracy came under attack by domestic terrorists, egged on by Donald Trump.** Millions of Americans watched it unfold on live television. Numerous media outlets have recreated the timeline, assembling footage from multiple viewpoints. But despite all that, how much do we really know about what caused the insurrection? How did all those people know to come to the Capitol at that hour? Who paid for them to get there (if anyone)? Were their actions coordinated beforehand and during the attack? And if so, by whom? Why were there such widespread security failures, and who was responsible? It seems that most Republicans in Congress — led by GOP leader Kevin McCarthy — want to sweep this under the rug. They want to pretend it never happened. **We are not going to let that happen. This week, a select committee of the House began hearings into what happened in the run-up to that terrible day.** The testimony of the four officers on Monday was a powerful reminder that this is not a political football or a partisan game. At least 140 officers were injured that day and our Capitol was breached by a mob bent on stopping the peaceful transfer of power. The American people deserve the truth. As Liz Cheney said, "If those responsible are not held accountable, and if Congress does not act responsibly, this will remain a cancer on our constitutional republic, undermining the peaceful transfer of power at the heart of our democracy system." We must ensure that this never, ever happens again. _Rick_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33186749/298110784/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2021-07-29-jansix&refcode2=719290e1-92f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTkyOTBlMS05MmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWifHjphXNm_3rAIvWYoIBeQZnW_CG5Eoc2u_x5Cn5g=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33186751/298110786/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2021-07-29-jansix&refcode2=719290e1-92f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTkyOTBlMS05MmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWifHjphXNm_3rAIvWYoIBeQZnW_CG5Eoc2u_x5Cn5g=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33186753/298110788/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2021-07-29-jansix&refcode2=719290e1-92f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTkyOTBlMS05MmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWifHjphXNm_3rAIvWYoIBeQZnW_CG5Eoc2u_x5Cn5g=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33186755/298110790/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2021-07-29-jansix&refcode2=719290e1-92f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTkyOTBlMS05MmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWifHjphXNm_3rAIvWYoIBeQZnW_CG5Eoc2u_x5Cn5g=)

clean_body: | | | On January 6th, our democracy came under attack by domestic terrorists, egged on by Donald Trump. Millions of Americans watched it unfold on live television. Numerous media outlets have recreated the timeline, assembling footage from multiple viewpoints. But despite all that, how much do we really know about what caused the insurrection? How did all those people know to come to the Capitol at that hour? Who paid for them to get there (if anyone)? Were their actions coordinated beforehand and during the attack? And if so, by whom? Why were there such widespread security failures, and who was responsible? It seems that most Republicans in Congress — led by GOP leader Kevin McCarthy — want to sweep this under the rug. They want to pretend it never happened. We are not going to let that happen. This week, a select committee of the House began hearings into what happened in the run-up to that terrible day. The testimony of the four officers on Monday was a powerful reminder that this is not a political football or a partisan game. At least 140 officers were injured that day and our Capitol was breached by a mob bent on stopping the peaceful transfer of power. The American people deserve the truth. As Liz Cheney said, "If those responsible are not held accountable, and if Congress does not act responsibly, this will remain a cancer on our constitutional republic, undermining the peaceful transfer of power at the heart of our democracy system." We must ensure that this never, ever happens again. They are doing this not just by opposing legislation that would address these issues and has popular support, but by trying to silence the will of the people through voter suppression. Pennsylvanians are tired of simple-sounding sound bites. They know our challenges are complex and want real solutions. = That’s why I am contacting you , Peter. From my bipartisan bill on marijuana decriminalization to legislation that would restore the rights of Pennsylvanians incarcerated over low-level nonviolent crimes like cannabis possession, we are so close to ensuring a brighter, safer and more socially just future for all Pennsylvanians. However, Republicans in the Pennsylvania Legislature have dedicated themselves to blocking progress on social justice and criminal justice reform. They are doing this not just by opposing legislation that would address these issues and has popular support, but by trying to silence the will of the people through voter suppression. = = I chose a life in public service to work on these difficult challenges. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of July 26th: Remove Cheney & Kinzinger from GOP Conference!
body:
| |
---
This week, we want to urge the House Republican Leadership to remove Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger from the GOP Conference, as well as continuing our local action.

See below for additional action items, and thank you for all you do!

**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Call the Republican House leadership & tell them to remove Cheney & Kinzinger from the GOP Conference
* Local: Sign up to attend an August local government meeting
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**NATIONAL
Tell House Republican Leadership to Remove Cheney and Kinzinger from the GOP Conference!
**
Call the following House Republicans with the appropriate messages that are indicated below. It is beyond time to kick Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger out of the House Republican Conference.

**NOTE:** We know that calling Congress feels like a waste of time, but we have heard that inside the Republican Conference, there is a push to remove Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger for their actions. **House Republicans are specifically asking us to call leadership, to show that we agree that Cheney and Kinzinger should be ousted.**

Below is a list of who to call and the message to leave when you call. The first two need slightly different messages, and the remaining Reps. can receive the exact same message.
* **Rep. Kevin McCarthy
** House Minority Leader**
**[(202) 225-2915](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNTI5MTU_bWlkPTQ0MTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=_67MIBXbHeARW_pY-YKi0g "tel:2022252915")
_**Message:** First, thank you for getting the permit for CPAC and TPPA to hold the Cuba Libre rally on Tuesday. Second, I am grateful that you are standing up for the American people, and so, it is imperative that Rep. Cheney and Rep. Kinzinger are removed from the Republican Conference. You do not need people who are actively working against the Republican Conference and undermining your leadership. They do not need to have any role making decisions on behalf of Republicans, as they are now acting as Democrats, having taken positions on Nancy Pelosi’s fake commission. Please remove them from the GOP conference immediately. Thank you._

* **Rep. Elise Stefanik
** Chair of the House Republican Conference**
**[(202) 225-4611](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNTQ2MTE_bWlkPTQ0MTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=mKcXmndA3vBv6gJBrnyorQ "tel:2022254611")
_**Message:** First, thank you for speaking at the Cuba Libre rally. Second, I am grateful that you are standing up for the American people, and so, it is imperative that Rep. Cheney and Rep. Kinzinger are removed from the Republican Conference. You do not need people who are actively working against the Republican Conference and undermining your leadership. They do not need to have any role making decisions on behalf of Republicans, as they are now acting as Democrats, having taken positions on Nancy Pelosi’s fake commission. Please remove them from the GOP conference immediately. Thank you._

**The following Republicans can receive the same message, which is below their phone numbers.**
* **Rep. Steve Scalise
** Republican Whip****
[(202) 225-3015](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNTMwMTU_bWlkPTQ0MTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=KXa7DhXf67hbdvRf1KzoVw "tel:2022253015")
* **Rep. Tom Emmer**
National Republican Congressional Committee Chairman
[(202) 225-2331](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AMjAyMjI1MjMzMT9taWQ9NDQxMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_rPnnFVsFnf__eYHnw8l1Q)

* **Rep. Jim Banks**
Republican Study Committee Chairman
[(202) 225-4436](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNTQ0MzY_bWlkPTQ0MTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=eE0VAhCiN9NpFf-VWmQ0qw "tel:2022254436")

_**Message:** I am grateful that you are standing up for the American people, and so, it is imperative that Rep. Cheney and Rep. Kinzinger are removed from the Republican Conference. You do not need people who are actively working against the Republican Conference and undermining your leadership. They do not need to have any role making decisions on behalf of Republicans, as they are now acting as Democrats, having taken positions on Nancy Pelosi’s fake commission. Please remove them from the GOP conference immediately. Thank you._
|
---
Last week, Chuck Schumer attempted to take the first step towards a vote on a “bipartisan” infrastructure package. Despite the deal not being completed, Schumer announced that the Senate would hold a procedural vote to open debate on Wednesday. Presumably, Schumer believed this would be a good way to pressure negotiators to finish the legislation by that deadline...but he couldn’t have been more wrong. Instead, Senate Republicans blocked the infrastructure bill by voting against opening debate. With Senate Republicans asking, how could they vote to open debate on a bill that hasn’t been written? A great question, that Schumer was left unable to answer.

This was the right choice by Republicans. Legislation rushed along by an “arbitrary deadline,” set by Democrats, is not truly bipartisan. Nor is legislation that’s contingent upon the passage of a much larger, divisive piece of legislation, bipartisan.

Senate Republicans should refuse to vote on a deal, so long as Democrats continue to make the deal contingent upon the passage of Joe Biden’s reckless $3.5 trillion spending plan. [Nancy Pelosi has drawn her hard line, Republicans should as well.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL3BlbG9zaS1iaXBhcnRpc2FuLWluZnJhc3RydWN0dXJlLWJpbGwtcmVjb25jaWxpYXRpb24tcGFja2FnZT9taWQ9NDQxMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=dgNfGtcU7ilDhQAp-MVdlg)
|

Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**

At a time when our economy should be roaring in full recovery mode, American businesses and consumers alike are bracing for the effects of inflation.

Prices of materials are rising, the cost of production is rising and subsequently consumer prices are soaring. While the Biden Administration wants the American people to believe that inflation is transitory, all key economic indicators suggest otherwise.

On top of this, the Biden Administration is proposing record-breaking spending, to a degree that would even make Jimmy Carter blush. This makes any attempts to stabilize inflation futile, as the administration continues to throw taxpayer dollars onto the growing inflationary fire.

In the words of Kaylee McGhee White at the Washington Examiner: [Ready or not, inflation is here...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL3JlYWR5LW9yLW5vdC1pbmZsYXRpb24taXMtaGVyZT9taWQ9NDQxMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=2FqIQGHHJ1BQP_YUm_ibzw)

“Teachers unions long have traded on the assumption, held by parents who don’t pay that much attention, that the unions exist to promote the public interest – specifically, on a foundational premise that they ‘fight’ for ‘better education’ for the school-age children in their charge.

But the pandemic, and the teachers unions’ reactions to it, has revealed with shocking clarity that the teachers’ unions have been doing nothing of the sort. They haven’t been fighting for the students; heck, they haven’t even been fighting for all teachers. In reality, they have been, and are still, fighting to advance the interests of one relatively small clique of teachers who share doctrinaire beliefs about the proper response to the pandemic and, just as importantly, radical beliefs about America.”

[Read Jenny Beth Martin’s entire column about how teachers union malpractice here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjEwLWY3MDNjZmZkMjQ2MzRhMmQ4NzY4N2U1MDI0NjRiZGFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvanVsLzIwL25ldmVyLWZvcmdldC10ZWFjaGVycy11bmlvbnMtZm91Z2h0LXRvLWtlZXAtc2Nob29sLz9taWQ9NDQxMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=FgYlMhLQTKewsvI4aJdkGQ)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I need your help now that Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have decided that defeating me in New Hampshire is the fastest way to put Republicans back in charge of the Senate. They're even personally recruiting my 2022 opponent. Mitch McConnell's cronies are attacking me on TV. One McConnell-linked group has targeted me as part of a multi-million dollar ad campaign. And it’s working - **a WMUR poll that recently came out has me DOWN by ONE POINT.** My team says we need to raise an average of $2,500 each day between now and the end of the month to hit our July goal. **[Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can to help us hit that benchmark today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33187121/298111933/-846459524?refcode=e20210729_mwh-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzc2NjI2ZS05NGYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5DJrzeDo7Cong22gXByGZ6lgj7Bn9RQ3NCsfKoZtM=)** McConnell and his buddies have promised that more ads are coming. It’s no surprise _The Boston Globe_ called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection.” _This is no time for my grassroots support to dip._ If we stumble now, we’ll hand the Republicans a huge talking point. More outside money will pour into New Hampshire. Our opponents will step up their attacks. **Republicans only need to flip one seat to regain Senate control, and right now, polls show that they could flip my seat in New Hampshire.** If they defeat me and take back the Senate, there will be no progress on issues like jobs, voting rights, climate change, and protecting a woman’s right to choose. **[With all this at stake, will you please let me know that I have your support by donating $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33187124/298111934/-846459524?refcode=e20210729_mwh-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzc2NjI2ZS05NGYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5DJrzeDo7Cong22gXByGZ6lgj7Bn9RQ3NCsfKoZtM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33187125/298111937/-846459524?refcode=e20210729_mwh-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzc2NjI2ZS05NGYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gN5DJrzeDo7Cong22gXByGZ6lgj7Bn9RQ3NCsfKoZtM=)

name: Ed Hutchison, National Police Association
subject: "Defund the Police" is a DISASTER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Police Association
body:
The left-wing anti-cop agenda goes back decades. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c248%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=VK%2fGktXC46K0fU%2bMyoc5Ow&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65532%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Q7yjLmxF4xr11xOo4wDbg&sysid=1) Friend, The left-wing anti-cop agenda goes back decades. But now, over the last couple years, it’s been front and center... The “woke” mob taking to the streets and the politicians who support their “Defund the Police” nonsense are **BEYOND CLUELESS** and **TRULY DANGEROUS**. Major cities across America have now cut funding for law enforcement. The criminals have been emboldened, and violent crime is SURGING. Violence against officers on the streets is way up too, _including a 50% year-over-year spike in ambush attacks_. Here at the National Police Association, we’re leading the charge to **BACK THE BLUE** and expose the “Defund the Police” movement. We need everyone who supports our men and women in uniform to help. **[Will you JOIN OUR TEAM today with a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 donation?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65533%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNOjVmgRKDBuT2f1Oqg9qw&sysid=1)** [**DONATE HERE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65534%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PonmRO5eYGXVXi1laCW3AA&sysid=1) For months, Joe Biden has refused to condemn these Democrat-run cities that have cut funding for police departments - he is a coward who doesn’t want to cross the “woke” mob. That list of cities is long and growing, including Austin, Atlanta, Baltimore, Los Angeles, Minneapolis, Portland, Seattle, and many others. __New York City alone has slashed its police budget by $1 BILLION!__ Between these “Defund the Police” budget cuts and the out-of-control violence we’re seeing on the streets, it’s no wonder that officers are retiring in record numbers. Our communities are at risk, Friend. We’re counting on everyday folks who Back the Blue to step up and join our fight. Our work includes public outreach to get out our message, supporting officers in legal cases, and offering rewards to bring criminals who target police officers to justice and get them off our streets. Support our men and women out there working hard to protect and serve. Help us send a message to the pro-police politicians out there that the American people have their backs. **[Sustain our fight at the National Police Association HERE >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65545%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d1DRxoeoZPp3Vctn3EyV0w&sysid=1)** Sincerely, Ed Hutchison, President & CEO
National Police Association [**DONATE $5**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65546%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uskSq%2b5kZF7%2byEcctcpUuw&sysid=1) [**DONATE $10**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65547%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mf8Bt12rzD%2fsyEgaDAJHOQ&sysid=1) [**DONATE $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65548%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=486xgF6yZkn4xKm99wfkrA&sysid=1) [**DONATE $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65549%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gQ%2bsEzvBTvpqGG3CNQXnTg&sysid=1) [**DONATE $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65540%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P7bO%2fSWXO8NOigyDYFX%2fJQ&sysid=1) [**DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65541%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=86oaN51DNLv06D4aDP0MQg&sysid=1) | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65542%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fUm2K74RJpMDryCpfp%2blAA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65543%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5DLRE4MtNuhaOMUtCXkKFA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65544%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xEVKM6Z%2fEQcsESFcVEkYBw&sysid=1)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The future of our democracy is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hy%2By5rVvQ8cQgT8jqpuy5hSrdH%2B%2BrvhM&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We're coming up on our big July fundraising deadline, but we're still $8,456 short of our goal. I'm sorry for being blunt, but this is absolutely not the time for Democrats to fall short of our goals: If we lose just one single Senate seat in 2022, control of the chamber is lost to Mitch McConnell - and with it, our ability to make any shred of progress in collaboration with President Biden.
The Republican Party is growing more extreme before our eyes. If Democrats lose a single seat and allow Republicans to regain power, I truly fear for the future of our democracy.
Just look at what Republicans have done in recent months: Extremist GOP state legislators have introduced more than 400 bills to suppress the right to vote, and many of those bills have become _the law_ in states like Arizona, Florida, and Georgia. My Republican colleagues in Congress have even refused to fight for truth and democracy, actually opposing an independent commission to investigate the Jan. 6 insurrection.
**Democrats ' razor-thin control of the Senate is a crucial bulwark against GOP extremism, but I'll be honest: We're hanging on by a thread. **We can't afford to lose a single seat - but the powerful national Senate Republican campaign committee, with Mitch McConnell at the helm, has made my seat a target. They'll do whatever it takes to defeat me and stop our progressive agenda in its tracks.
**That 's why it is 100% crucial to hit this end-of-month fundraising goal so we have the resources it takes to win. **
**[So please, Friend, I'm asking: Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 or more to fight back against GOP attacks and protect this Senate seat? Whatever you give will ensure we keep the Senate in Democratic control.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1054-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5)**
Thank you for your support,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1054-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FDjg05%2FiclSBtBhNYMkM%2B5LAEXPHCyeC&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)
