body:
I received an email yesterday from my opponent’s campaign alleging that I’m “off the rails.” He’s upset because I’m no longer interested in revisiti | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdHZsZ1CiEavALEyoEUU3jQhCc-tMLMfa3YOxDk86uRMLWlh9AE3kBLpS1ucqHVlpahfLeZJhGgdbesynwUoC3RewBLCU4jkQmwgqilNW-77AUWJJ1ZX29Nq6_LTM-wtHmMLhZ_Q4_CDOWHcVWFn95I81N30XJSKql4rgiSX9fCqRizYIAhmY3ad9GGY8u2kI-VNULUX4kXZj7I6a2Xseaj8)

Peter,

I received an email yesterday from my opponent’s campaign alleging that I’m _“off the rails.”_

He’s upset because I’m no longer interested in revisiting the 2020 election – my race or otherwise; I’ve moved on. The country has attempted to move on, but Democrats want to keep talking about Donald Trump to cover up the mess they’ve created over the past 6 months. And what a mess it really is:

1. The cost of living is up (have you noticed the price of groceries?)
2. Crime in major cities is skyrocketing (have you read about the anarchy in Portland?)
3. A new record for illegal border crossings has been set every month since March

And what is my opponent doing in Washington? **[He’s working alongside Bernie Sanders to pass the biggest tax increase + spending package in U.S. History.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdFHS5k9cc3ZK6nPTBgGVHj0V0SHx9RAZyNVzov2u2lCKckXZqW8SPUSkjyR58jQmCPsJbRszmcEY96m_IYpAmbi87qPp0knJbKdi3dpOfLc2EIdaUbmA_WBQlahTibPChDJcuP3ZRJPoRc9LuzKdb1hMqRrR4cWILmJkdwx7Z4QJCn9W_yJ0nxuYKLVyUGX-yX1o40KjTtJxpFVZsLNOD5f)**

Peter DeFazio may not have the same notoriety as Bernie Sanders, but he’s just as dangerous. This is the man who is vouching for Bernie Sanders’ “infrastructure” companion bill in the House. **You can thank Bernie Sanders and Peter DeFazio for dramatic increase in cost of groceries, gas, and everyday living expenses.**

I’m not the one who is _“off the rails,”_ it’s safe to say the career politicians who have been in DC since I was a baby are the ones who have lost touch with reality.

**[In honor of my socialist, Green New Deal supporting, opponent and his proposed $3.5 trillion tax hike, would you help me raise $35,000 by the July fundraising deadline this Saturday? All it takes is a donation of $3.5, $35 or if you’re able $350 and so on and so forth.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdHSiFGcWutdF7dqEkgVKvWKlv0BxQ8UoLjb1tAYsIyvqKmK6z2HGWDUam-l5bWEruC1LToL1ro-UT6NUGvoS5SupbJjLETbKN9LXYO5a5kK1i8vKqG5ahzN-pv7vwFgh8htKf3LAMDqbAnhxIJ1n4tuqBxNWZ-AAi3kTGUpnByHXMfIS6_IuhMhpx9Nm1ZiCtmoyFCn8lbiZdpPyOjgT-gB)**

[**HELP ME RAISE $35,000 BY SATURDAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdG00_tRvhuGT3euMXDAtbGlfZRzXSklNdE8rb32vZx_orgDRkZsCvS3PMu3-mB3QCFlrBK184Eu5_P8MoQmIA21GicfzCCRQsptvCPBNjvUbWHF7WDF9kHZL94ChTcSjZCym4o7Ez3pfXO9K624rBz52JYwBKVyjOfGIQ8QeU-0f8jqLUVbYUOqd_I1-l_HOhVskKh0gC5YInVAfi52n3UE)
**By the way - this is what $3.5 trillion looks like written out: $3,500,000,000,000.**

My opponent’s email salaciously claims THAT I’m a political extremist, and I take particular umbrage with that sentiment. I fought extremism in Afghanistan; I fought extremism when I stopped a terrorist attack on a French train.

I may be a lot of things but **I’m not off the rails and I’m certainly not an extremist.** **[You’d be doing me a great honor if you would help me prove a point to the man who is bankrupting our country by making a donation of just $3.5 today.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdGVIT03ccRZkfupDwzfn2IILCNRW3O9x7d9DW71xT05VeJ4lqa-ctfhP_gLWHs844QkHROfFrXm7pBHlyV76lG31O8AhasTMmsE4wI4DX9eThdJnVv2IY_v1GDl0eo0rjotiLArjkXMGrDYeyQwNxjrypEVegEspGLCS7LBtWFTI9_bmk4I88P096YdMCeXHoL3JLox9snfScowbGO56BP-)**

[**HELP ME RAISE $35,000 BY SATURDAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=7ac4b0127a974b34b65b82a8bc358461&_e=TrcWeYM4uBdIOrI5UF6S2xUpkV8r5mPRsDm9dwVmzzZCsrHDblhqfxBYkopWrQUxi8jUb8y3iRihkwvIJ9LcwXjZdgb4cdDj8EoxrmsJm37L2SjaeCJ2wNhg0xiAI9fNIcXMT_mpigGIeWJKSgt2raK17XYD7fif4UgWXMxN4rnoneP5jDGsZHKk9NTb76QfnY2tgE-ntEhdDxl5CK7jxfpKMPmQje4V7cvrj3aYzdH10UVqRa3fblkMhDxJEP5X3oGdE1h9P-9_NT7A8iiaTFY1mLk2wQXrCKkp3rq0t_GH1LqR0GtjBsktFRY0xRyssL8DxOnTmlIEEAC1BpUfuTLEoY8BFT_aPCaLDrG-duFjv4RDEd-zvbIXlbQ6x4s2hXjBjjW6Dgpcc-_zHrL-uH8YQ3EWdhWoOuqFaiVXAffDIM12A5bzSs9MNaaLLl7m)
I’m tired of the BS coming out of Washington, and I hope you’ll take this opportunity to let me know that you are too.

Thank you,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I received an email yesterday from my opponent’s campaign alleging that I’m “off the rails.” He’s upset because I’m no longer interested in revisiti | Peter, I received an email yesterday from my opponent’s campaign alleging that I’m “off the rails.” He’s upset because I’m no longer interested in revisiting the 2020 election – my race or otherwise; I’ve moved on. The country has attempted to move on, but Democrats want to keep talking about Donald Trump to cover up the mess they’ve created over the past 6 months. And what a mess it really is: 1. The cost of living is up (have you noticed the price of groceries?) 2. Crime in major cities is skyrocketing (have you read about the anarchy in Portland?) 3. A new record for illegal border crossings has been set every month since March And what is my opponent doing in Washington? Peter DeFazio may not have the same notoriety as Bernie Sanders, but he’s just as dangerous. This is the man who is vouching for Bernie Sanders’ “infrastructure” companion bill in the House. You can thank Bernie Sanders and Peter DeFazio for dramatic increase in cost of groceries, gas, and everyday living expenses. I’m not the one who is “off the rails,” it’s safe to say the career politicians who have been in DC since I was a baby are the ones who have lost touch with reality. By the way - this is what $3.5 trillion looks like written out: $3,500,000,000,000. My opponent’s email salaciously claims THAT I’m a political extremist, and I take particular umbrage with that sentiment. I fought extremism in Afghanistan; I fought extremism when I stopped a terrorist attack on a French train. I may be a lot of things but I’m not off the rails and I’m certainly not an extremist. - I’m tired of the BS coming out of Washington, and I hope you’ll take this opportunity to let me know that you are too. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Karen Bass
subject: Republican fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
**" House GOP Campaign Arm Takes In Record $45 Million Fundraising Total, Outraising Democrats"**
\-- _Forbes_
Team, Republicans are only five seats away from taking back the House, and they just outraised us by millions.

The money they're raising directly funds the same politicians who voted to overturn a fair, democratic election. Politicians who _still support_ former President Trump, who called violent insurrectionists "good people."

**[We can't let corruption win, which is why my team is working to raise $6,000 in emergency funds before Saturday's end-of-month deadline so we can go toe-to-toe with the GOP's dark money. Every dollar we raise goes directly toward defending the Democratic House majority. Will you chip in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/nXw3PSwyOXg0lBxLeIK29evKLUqDOaYDHfQ4ddReDMA=/4cfoF7rdS57eEzy8YTR93HOLFQgNMg3nIATXNMpKryA=?gpsid=39_132_19945&refcode=em21_210728_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210728_eom1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Violent, unhinged conspiracy theorists have NO place in the People's House. But the hand-picked Republicans that are stacking up against some of my vulnerable colleagues are rubber stamps for Donald Trump's agenda.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Fox News revealed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I don't have much time: **[My entire Democratic Majority is in deep danger >>](https://links.e.dccc.)** ****

\-- Trump vowed to run for president if Republicans take back the House Majority.
\-- Republicans know they only need to flip FIVE seats to win.
**\-- And Fox News revealed that Republicans have launched new attack ads to unseat FIVE of my most critical Democrats!**

******[I cannot overstate the importance of what I'm about to ask you: One of the ONLY things standing in the way of another Trump Presidency is our ability to HOLD the House and PROTECT our Democrats. So I need your help to beat back Republican lies and DEFEND our House Majority. I'm calling for 1O,OOO gifts to fund our efforts and make sure these Republican attacks don't sway our key voters. Can I count on your $3 to protect our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFvWKRgC_)**
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.dccc.)[ 7/31, 11:59PM](https://links.e.dccc.)
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFvWKRgCR_)

[_Suggested Support: $1_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---

I'll be honest: Our Majority is razor-thin.

**A mere handful of votes could cost us the House and launch Trump 's presidential run.**

Which is why I need you to step up in this moment more than I ever have before.

Because if I can't respond to these vicious Republican smear ads and defend my House Democrats, it could be the end of our Democratic House Majority as we know it.

******[I refuse to let that happen. I will not allow Republicans and their dangerous one-term president to spread atrocious lies, defeat our Majority, and buy their way back into power. So I’m asking: Will you rush $3 to protect our House Majority before it’s too late? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hv9K0WC-)**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: allow me to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
The next few days, my team and I will be reaching out to you about our upcoming end of month deadline. Can I have a minute to explain why it’s so important?
On Saturday, we have an important July fundraising deadline. We’ve set a goal of 10,000 contributions and need your help. And the more people who donate, the better we can show the strength behind our movement.
Right now, we are focused on passing universal background checks and submitting comments to the ATF to urge them to ban dangerous ghost guns. However, we’re also fighting back against the National Shooting Sports Foundation — an organization who has emerged to fill the NRA’s shoes while they retreat into bankruptcy.
So in order to get the job done, we need a lot of resources. And a large majority of those resources come in response to emails like this.
So before I go any further, please allow me to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210729-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=410_3935704_C0w130&akid=410%2E3935704%2EC0w130)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210729-1-subs&t=14&refcode2=410_3935704_C0w130&akid=410%2E3935704%2EC0w130)**

---
****
Each day, we are doing important work to save lives and fight back against preventable gun violence. The NRA and NSSF are raising millions of dollars to try and stop or reverse our progress.
Your donation will immediately be put to work so we can achieve our goal and save lives.
Thank you for pitching in and keeping up the fight with us.
My very best,

clean_body: Friends — The next few days, my team and I will be reaching out to you about our upcoming end of month deadline. Can I have a minute to explain why it’s so important? On Saturday, we have an important July fundraising deadline. We’ve set a goal of 10,000 contributions and need your help. And the more people who donate, the better we can show the strength behind our movement. Right now, we are focused on passing universal background checks and submitting comments to the ATF to urge them to ban dangerous ghost guns. However, we’re also fighting back against the National Shooting Sports Foundation — an organization who has emerged to fill the NRA’s shoes while they retreat into bankruptcy. So in order to get the job done, we need a lot of resources. And a large majority of those resources come in response to emails like this. So before I go any further, please allow me to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Each day, we are doing important work to save lives and fight back against preventable gun violence. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Mark needs us, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends -
I’m reaching out today to ask you to support my husband, Mark, so he can hold this Arizona Senate seat. Please, give me a chance to explain why this is so important.
I know just how hard these campaigns can be. National Republicans see people like Mark, who are independent and put their constituents first, as a threat. That’s why we have always known that outside groups would come out of the woodwork to spend untold amounts of money to try and take back this Senate seat in 2022.
Just this month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped into the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And only a few days ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So it's clear Trump and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to beat Mark.
**Mark needs our help to fight off these attacks, and the best way to do that is by reaching his 40,000 contribution goal by our deadline on Saturday at midnight. We can’t afford to fall short, so what do you say, friend?**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210729-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1043_6688874_NWxhnM&akid=1043%2E6688874%2ENWxhnM)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The CDC Flip-Flops AGAIN!
body:
Just as we predicted, the federal government is recommending mask mandates... AGAIN!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AMYYpLhhajO5VsYTk8aSDQNXreaSMo0H51Ld28z7Q9gJS84tT7UUtYUjHp7y3kfEnPV1102taP9Avj_v4Hzk0HaIju8uHHUklVtdNQyvz7xJJg2kDSA-gwZos-sLxwm9rHX0nY0sEv6LtM649ZECIw==&c=VeCJq0IFC6YpZZFTeC1xOOrHuhSY6zvuaXoXDH9M2G3TnOW-4vD0mw==&ch=q0HwSDeyDy0FPQs7g-iULeM9fHCJtcFpioHdxSq-cj08un9uvY6u9Q==)
---
| Peter,
Just as we predicted, the federal government is recommending mask mandates AGAIN!
The CDC announced this week that even if you're vaccinated you should go back to wearing masks. After telling us vaccines were the pathway to normalcy, they've gone back on their word. This isn't medical science, it's political science.
And, of course, the Left's beloved unelected bureaucratic leader, Dr. Fauci, who assured us that vaccinated individuals no longer needed to wear masks, is now recommending vaccinated adults wear masks... again. Fauci also wants to force 3-year-old kids to wear masks indefinitely.
As he has done from the beginning of the pandemic, Governor DeSantis will not bow to the will of career government bureaucrats known for flip-flopping their position so much it leaves your head spinning. Instead, Governor DeSantis will continue doing what he has always done: Make data-driven decisions.
With mask mandates returning in many places across the country, Governor DeSantis knows the importance of protecting the liberty of Floridians. Florida will not allow any lockdowns, school closures, restrictions, or mandates.
[WATCH: Governor DeSantis explains how mask mandates for children is bad policy.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AMYYpLhhajO5VsYTk8aSDQNXreaSMo0H51Ld28z7Q9gJS84tT7UUtUNgzZhYUefhQ-dA5ByKN61XlgYO6X0xgG5elGPliJht2E91PazwykdIv_aJDrkBfCiphsHm5rouG43CQVpAluMhMp2y7XxV9rgpkSuRw5f0ulEuPSM20FseJwonQLe6cj-kozZpw0_M-bVucbMzJB8TM0K4Xt9cAg==&c=VeCJq0IFC6YpZZFTeC1xOOrHuhSY6zvuaXoXDH9M2G3TnOW-4vD0mw==&ch=q0HwSDeyDy0FPQs7g-iULeM9fHCJtcFpioHdxSq-cj08un9uvY6u9Q==)
We must not allow these out-of-touch political bureaucrats to strip our liberty and Governor DeSantis is doing his part to keep Florida free!
Sincerely, Team DeSantis

clean_body: That’s what it’s all about. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, Do you realize how hard President Trump is fighting for you? As the Chairman of the North Carolina Republican Party, I know President Trump. I can tell you with absolute certainty that he works around the clock to SAVE AMERICA and keep his promises to the American People. But now, he needs your help. To reclaim President Trump’s House and Senate Majorities, we need to WIN NORTH CAROLINA. And unfortunately, we’re still $23,911 short of our next fundraising goal. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | But with this Fundraising Deadline looming, and us still being $23,911 short, I’m worried. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Message & data rates may apply. = Peter, we’re beyond humbled that our campaign’s average donation is $17. = | = We pride ourselves that our campaign is fully funded by hard-working Americans like you. Because -- unlike Devin Nunes -- Democrat Phil Arballo refuses to let corrupt corporate PACs buy him off. But that means to beat Nunes, we’re depending on Democrats like you to fuel this fight, one $17 dollar donation at a time. We know that your $17 can go far in your pocket -- $17 can help with groceries, or put a few gallons of gas in your tank. So Peter, we don’t make this ask lightly. But, we’re just days away from our End of Month Deadline, and we need 594 Democrats to chip in $17 to get us back on track to hit our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = We really appreciate it, Peter. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. From day one, we’ve told you how we’re going to win:**by organizing in every corner of the district and inspiring voters with a better way forward.**
Our August 14th Day of Action is our biggest event yet -- and the start of the biggest grassroots organizing campaign that Western North Carolina’s ever seen. We’ll be knocking on doors, phone banking, and doing relational organizing -- all to connect directly with voters and keep building our team
But it won’t be easy. We need print-outs, clipboards, pens, stickers, pamphlets, buttons, yard signs, water, coffee, masks, hand sanitizer, and snacks. Lots of snacks.
Those costs add up quickly. Our budget for our event is based on our fundraising projections for this month -- _that’s why we really need to hit our July goal._

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
While Washington, D.C. drags its feet on climate action, Washington state is making strides.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcm2pqZfb/YkJjV3FDT1B3MngwY1dvV0dxaTVsVzhTSGVWamRBUnJmQWdZcHJwdHdTUzNwTWRGVENiV0REL1dEejlUZU9mMGtPeXo0M2JyYkVUUFhmSGt5by9nMWFlNVN6bEY4Z281eWE5amZUQkh0aGM9S0/QllXYy9VM0xjeUdEbG9xQVFWK2l1MWNyLytNMTFEaTdDVE5SbEQyUzkvdz0S1) Friend, You know just as much as I do how important it is to keep the momentum going on bold climate action. With every passing day, the destructive force of the climate crisis stares us harder in the face. Here in Washington state, it has been exceedingly rare to see 100-degree temperatures for days on end -- that is, until this summer. The Department of Health estimates that 112 people in our state have died from the heat. Oregon has seen a similar loss of life. I had to call a state of emergency in counties across the state as some of our roads buckled. And an estimated 1 billion shellfish perished in the Northwest during the heat dome, hurting an important industry in our region. In the village of Lytton, British Columbia, the temperature soared to an unprecedented 121 degrees. Hours later, a fire tore through the town, decimating it. Across the globe, the world watched with horror as historic floods tore through Europe and China, displacing more than a million people and causing hundreds of deaths. Homes collapsed. Trees were ripped from the ground. Fields and roads were washed away. Landscapes are unrecognizable. This isn't a Hollywood movie. It's a full-blown, real-life, feel-it-in-your-bones crisis -- and Americans are counting on leaders to lead. **That 's what I'm here to do. While Washington, D.C. drags its feet on climate action, Washington state is making strides. This legislative session, we've passed the Climate Commitment Act and other historic laws to reverse the course of this crisis. But there's more work to do, and our potential for progress is only as strong as the movement behind us. ** [**_So today, I 'm humbly asking: Will you make a contribution before our official end-of-month deadline, so we can keep leading and showing the world what bold climate action looks like?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdLXpyQ~/YkJjV3FDT1B3MngwY1dvV0dxaTVsVzhTSGVWamRBUnJmQWdZcHJwdHdTUzNwTWRGVENiV0REL1dEejlUZU9mMGtPeXo0M2JyYkVUUFhmSGt5by9nMWFlNVN6bEY4Z281eWE5amZUQkh0aGM9S0/QllXYy9VM0xjeUdEbG9xQVFWK2l1MWNyLytNMTFEaTdDVE5SbEQyUzkvdz0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/-YkqHqZz83Bg/YkJjV3FDT1B3MngwY1dvV0dxaTVsVzhTSGVWamRBUnJmQWdZcHJwdHdTUzNwTWRGVENiV0REL1dEejlUZU9mMGtPeXo0M2JyYkVUUFhmSGt5by9nMWFlNVN6bEY4Z281eWE5amZUQkh0aGM9S0/QllXYy9VM0xjeUdEbG9xQVFWK2l1MWNyLytNMTFEaTdDVE5SbEQyUzkvdz0S1)

clean_body: | | | | | , | I wish I could say I was surprised. This morning, Nancy Pelosi declared that she would be having the Capitol Police put handcuffs on staff and visitors chose not to wear a mask. That’s right. Nancy Pelosi is ready to arrest Americans for not wearing a mask (even though we see her on TV everyday without one) just because she says so. This is just the next step in her consistent trend of Abuse of Power. | | | Right now America is facing rising inflation, surging crime, and an open border. But Nancy Pelosi’s priority: arrest vaccinated Americans for not wearing a mask. Now more than ever, we need to be doing everything in our power to Fire Nancy Pelosi and return a conservative majority to Congress. | | | | | | | | | There is no time to wait. Congressman Randy Feenstra | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Chris Pappas' lack of leadership has cost New Hampshire too many times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Pappas will do the bidding of Nancy Pelosi and AOC, not what's best for the people of New Hampshire
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/1/0100017af30a0781-5f27f335-2d84-4b67-b185-3da649349714-000000/nVNqraYnjfERuRRdI-GydcrmiY0=229)
Derek,
Chris Pappas has a long history of following the orders of his puppet masters.
His voting record is shameful. He is completely unwilling to oppose the massive spending and tax increases being proposed by out-of-touch DC Democrats. As job numbers stagnate, and inflation soars, now is not the time to begin another round of massive spending.
New Hampshire should be Congressman Pappas' first concern, but time and time again, he has followed orders, and put his own political career before his constituents. We are left on the hook for his poor decisions, and left to pay the bill.
His lack of leadership has cost Granite Staters one too many times.
\- Chairman Stephen Stepanek

name: Alex Padilla
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important ask to make ahead of our July fundraising deadline on Saturday. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.
On Saturday, we are going to report our fundraising numbers for the month and it’s so important that we put up a strong showing. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._
This month, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have continued to use the filibuster to rule from the minority. Their efforts to block our progress on voting rights and other critical legislation must come to an end.
That is why I need your help today. We need to hold this Senate seat in California and expand our majority so it becomes impossible for McConnell and his allies to block us from the minority.
**And if we can hit our 2,000 contribution July fundraising goal, it’ll show that we are more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why before Saturday’s deadline I have to ask:**
[**Can you please add a contribution of $3 to our grassroots campaign before our July fundraising deadline? We’re still a bit short of our goal and your support is essential if we’re going to get there.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210729-1-15&t=1&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=2&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=3&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=4&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=5&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=6&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210729-1-15&t=7&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)
---|---
Our fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to stop us.
But that’s okay because I believe this team is ready to put in the work during the tough fights ahead.
And I am so thankful to know we’re in this together.
Thank you in advance for chipping in!
Warmly,
—Alex
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210729-1-15&t=8&refcode2=201_159979_2DnKI7&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=201%2E159979%2E2DnKI7)

body:
In its short tenure the Biden administration has extended a special reprieve for five different groups of illegal immigrants living in the U.S.

# [“Temporary” Reprieve Extended for Five Groups of Illegal Immigrants; Yemenis the Latest](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56300&L=25415&F=H&)
In its short tenure the Biden administration has extended a special reprieve for five different groups of illegal immigrants living in the U.S. The most recent was renewed a few days ago for thousands of people from Yemen, the Middle Eastern Islamic nation well known as an Al Qaeda breeding ground. Officially, the provisional amnesty is known as Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to shield undocumented aliens from deportation during emergencies. It is supposed to be a short-term solution for foreign nationals that do not quality as refugees but cannot immediately return home because of difficulties caused by factors such as violence, natural disasters, or political and economic instability. TPS, which is typically granted in 18-month increments, not only protects foreign nationals from deportation it also allows them to work in the U.S.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56300&L=25415&F=H&)

I just exposed Nancy Pelosi’s mob tactics in the House of Representatives.

| Friend,

I just exposed Speaker Nancy Pelosi's mob tactics in the House of Representatives. In this new "power-grab" mandate, Nancy Pelosi says she will report Members of Congress (her colleagues) to the Sergeant at Arms for not wearing masks EVEN if they are vaccinated. This new mandate also directs the Capitol Police to ARREST any staff and visitors that do not wear a mask in the United States Capitol!

Pelosi is so hungry for power that she forgets our nation's capitol building is owned by the United States taxpayer, not her socialist overlords that run the Radical Left.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: our budget + Peter's donor file
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
TBH, delaying our office openings by even a month could put us behind.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210729-2113-header&t=1&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)
Peter,
We've got just a couple days left to close the gap on our $102,769 fundraising goal — the highly specific, must-raise amount we need in order to get our first Pittsburgh field office fully operational before it opens later this summer.
We're talking printers, desks + chairs, clipboards, campaign literature — the whole shebang!
**As we hammer out our budget, the finance team and I have been poring over our donor files. I wanted to show you what we saw next to your name. 👇**
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25065?refcode=em20210729-2113&t=2&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)**
---
Getting our statewide organizing program up and running this summer will be no small deal.
Opening field offices, hiring organizing staff, engaging with volunteers, and keeping the lights on and bills paid as we spread John Fetterman's message across all of PA's 67 counties is going to be costly and require a ton of resources.
**But here's the thing, Peter: Delaying our office openings by even a month could put us behind** — especially in a competitive Senate race like ours, where early + consistent preparation means absolutely everything.
[**Hence all the urgency behind closing the gap on our $102,769 July fundraising goal. Would you be willing to donate your very first $5 before Saturday at midnight to help us get there? Anything helps!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25065?refcode=em20210729-2113&t=3&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25065?refcode=em20210729-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)**
Thank you for everything!
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. I know it might not feel like it sometimes with our election still months away, but believe me when I say that **hitting our fundraising goals *now* will have an outsized impact on what our team can accomplish in the crucial weeks and months to come.**[**Please chip in your first $5 right now if you can to help John + our team close the gap on our big July goal of $102,769 for our field program.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25065?refcode=em20210729-2113&t=23&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210729-2113-footer&t=24&refcode2=2113_434096_l8p_R7&akid=2113%2E434096%2El8p_R7)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Justice for Capitol Police - Help Us Defeat Jan 6 Instigator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Dear Friend,
If you were like me, you were shaken by the honest and gut-wrenching testimony given by the brave officers who defended our Capitol on January 6th, while violent extremists tried to overturn our democratic elections. These men shared the details of horrific physical and verbal assaults. They were tasered, beaten, and crushed. They were subjected to racial taunting and death threats. They feared for their very lives while protecting the sanctity of our democratic government.
First of all, I want these officers to know we heard them . We salute them and all who did their duty to our Country that day , while a violent, extremist mob did their best to destroy the soul of our nation.
But, they don’t just want us to know what happened. They want us to hold those responsible accountable for their actions--not just the rioters--but the ones who instigated this horrible attack. Like Representative Scott Perry, one of the key instigators [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021] of the plot to overturn the 2020 elections on January 6. DONATE NOW TO HELP HOLD THE INSTIGATORS OF THE CAPITOL ATTACKS ACCOUNTABLE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021?refcode=email_cpd_20210729]And it gets worse. After trying to overturn the election results on that day, he has continually denied the importance of his actions, sometimes even doubling down, saying:
"It’s all politics, it’s all garbage,” after voting AGAINST giving Officer Eugene Goodman a Congressional Gold Medal (June 16th, 2021).
"I am happy to have objected... and I would do it again.” during a virtual town hall [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021] .
In the days following those attacks, story after story [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021?] tied him as a key instigator in the events of that dark day. Justice must be done in the name of these brave officers.
We have the power to hold Scott Perry accountable. Unlike the rest of the “Seditionist Caucus,” Scott Perry is in a vulnerable district and CAN be defeated. But we need your help.
Any donation will help us hold Scott Perry accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021]To hold those in power responsible requires a strong Congress. I am fighting to defeat Scott Perry and win one of the twenty seats that can go from Red to Blue in '22. Help me create a government that is focused on bringing jobs and security to the people, and accountability for its leaders.
Thanks,
Eugene
We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to.
Eugene DePasquale is considering running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit EugeneForCongress.com [https://eugeneforcongress.com/] . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/ [https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/] https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA [https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA] https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/ [https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/]
This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. Chip in any amount to help Eugene flip PA-10 blue in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
Donate to Eugene [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=100]
Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 [#]
United States [#]

name: Nikki Fried
subject: BREAKING: DeSantis wants to overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

This is urgent: today, Ron DeSantis signed on to a Mississippi lawsuit that seeks to overturn Roe v. Wade.

DeSantis has launched a DIRECT attack on a woman’s right to choose. Click here to rush a $5 contribution and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-roe]

When it comes to healthcare, Ron DeSantis poses a dire threat to women across Florida. As Governor, he’s pushed anti-choice legislation in Tallahassee and refused to expand access to healthcare.

Now, he’s joining the radical, far-right effort to overturn Roe v. Wade.

Team, I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who has never wavered in support of our right to choose. I’m on the strongest footing to fight back against DeSantis, win this race, and protect women’s healthcare. If you can help us fight back against DeSantis’ attack on Roe [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-roe] , please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-roe]

This isn’t about politics. It’s about doing what’s right and protecting our healthcare.

It’s about standing with the overwhelming majority of Americans who support a woman’s right to choose.

Thanks for fighting by my side on this. Together, we’ll stop DeSantis’ dangerous attacks on women.

In Solidarity,

Nikki

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I love Florida with all my heart.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
But Ron DeSantis loves running for President.
|
---

| | Friend,

I love Florida. I love her with all my heart -- and I love the people of this great state the most. I'm running for governor because right now, more than ever, the people of Florida need a governor that fights for them in Tallahassee. And that's unfortunately not what we're getting out of Gov. DeSantis. | [DONATE TO DEFEAT GOV. DESANTIS](https://act.myngp.com/el/yvjUgUe4Wqj90xuO245_jg==/AS91FS48C7W005BsYklS2g==?refcode=20210729_f_2_nd&amount=25)
---
He's signing bills that appeal to right-wing Republicans nationally instead of ones that help Floridians. He restricted voting rights even though Florida had one of the smoothest elections in our history. And he's turning away education funds that could help Florida's school kids impacted by the pandemic.

Why would he do all this? The answer is simple: he's running for president. While Floridians struggle to recover from the pandemic, Gov. DeSantis is jet-setting in California raising money from extremely wealthy, ideological donors, people with no real interest or stake in what's happening in Florida.

I've lived in Florida basically my whole life. She's a special place. While Gov. DeSantis has been off running around the country, I've been meeting with Floridians from every walk of life. And one thing is clear: It's time for a Florida for all.

Florida deserves better than Gov. DeSantis, but I need your help to win this election. Together we can make it clear that Florida is not a stepping stone to higher office -- it's a special place with special people, who deserve a governor that answers to _them_ , not wealthy out-of-state donors.

**If you 're able, please pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can today to help defeat Gov. DeSantis. Together, we can make Florida a place where everyone can get ahead.**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/yvjUgUe4Wqj90xuO245_jg==/AS91FS48C7W005BsYklS2g==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210729_f_2_nd&amount=50)

Thank you,

Charlie

name: Never Again PAC
subject: What we're learning from the Jan. 6 hearings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Last week, we emailed you about Officer Michael Fanone's harrowing experience on January 6. Now, thanks to Nancy Pelosi's select committee, we're learning more about what law enforcement experienced at the hands of the insurrectionists and the betrayal they've felt from Republicans in Congress. Last week, we emailed you about Officer Michael Fanone's harrowing experience on January 6. Now, thanks to Nancy Pelosi's select committee, we're learning more about what law enforcement experienced at the hands of the insurrectionists and the betrayal they've felt from Republicans in Congress.

Take a look at what Officer Fanone shared during Tuesday's hearing: "The indifference shown to my colleagues is disgraceful [...] Nothing has prepared me to address those elected members of our government **who continue to deny the events of that day and in doing so betray their oath of office.** " Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus incited the attack on our democracy on January 6. Their downplaying or denial of the events is not only disrespectful to the officers who put their lives on the line that day -- it shows that our democracy is in danger.

**[To protect our democracy, we cannot allow these dangerous Republicans to remain in office. Chip in before our end-of-month deadline to help us defeat the Treason Caucus.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33197312/298148796/-47384567?gpsid=8_139_19592&refcode=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiMDMzZGZhLWFmZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ShCVzEtVqwn1AqNqmiDnBHbh9kzbZJh3JhrgzO7aZkI=)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Team Never Again
Subject: Stand with Officer Fanone
Date: Monday, July 19, 2021
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33197314/298148797/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiMDMzZGZhLWFmZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ShCVzEtVqwn1AqNqmiDnBHbh9kzbZJh3JhrgzO7aZkI=&emci=d66b06c8-8ef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bb033dfa-aff0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) "I have kids."

That's what Officer Michael Fanone cried out -- _fearing for his life_ \-- as he was **tortured and beaten** by insurrectionists on January 6.

Fanone was **tasered, beaten with a flagpole, dragged down steps, and had his badge stolen off his chest.** The attack resulted in Fanone suffering a heart attack and concussion, and it's left him with PTSD and a traumatic brain injury.

This is the horrifying reality of the violence that officers faced from Trump supporters on January 6. But instead of rallying behind the officers who served and denouncing the attacks, the Treason Caucus has tried to minimize and move on from the dangerous events that they incited. They claim to support the police, but on January 6, they put politics before everyone's safety, and before democracy.

Fanone said what's been most difficult for him after the attack is seeing lawmakers downplay or lie about the attack for their own gain. He wants the lies to stop, saying **"I experienced firsthand an insurrection inspired by the head of our executive branch, Donald Trump, and his co-workers."**

The Treason Caucus has made it clear they'll do whatever it takes to rewrite history and escape accountability. Their disrespect to the officers is disgusting and unacceptable. We need to show them we won't stand for it.

**[Add your name to stand with Officer Fanone and all others who served on January 6 and denounce the actions of the Treason Caucus.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33197315/298148800/564748769?gpsid=8_139_19785&ms=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&refcode=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiMDMzZGZhLWFmZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ShCVzEtVqwn1AqNqmiDnBHbh9kzbZJh3JhrgzO7aZkI=&emci=d66b06c8-8ef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bb033dfa-aff0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC
Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33197318/298148801/-47384567?gpsid=8_139_19592&refcode=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210729_eom2_adv_gq_act__tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiMDMzZGZhLWFmZjAtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ShCVzEtVqwn1AqNqmiDnBHbh9kzbZJh3JhrgzO7aZkI=)

And I need you to donate right now because I'm falling short of my goal, friend.** [**This is vital: Please, can you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's right now – whatever you can spare before our fundraising deadline – so that we can defeat Marco Rubio? Every dollar you send my way will go directly toward stopping Rubio and protecting our Senate majority! There is a lot left to be done in this race, and even more at stake.

_Voting rights_ are at stake.
_Reproductive justice_ is at stake.
_Affordable health care_ is at stake.
_Gun violence prevention_ is at stake.

**I could go on, Peter ‐‐ But the choice is clear.**

I'll protect and improve our democracy, and my Republican opponent will continue to spread misinformation and lies.

As you read this email, my opponent continues to champion Trump’s dangerous election conspiracy theories.

I know Virginians deserve better than that. Which is why I refuse to stand by and let Republicans in our state turn back the clock ‐‐ _jeopardizing the progress we’ve made with our Democratic majority._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Record-setting month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/a-record-setting-month-2472794?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e0857ff48c&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, The Biden Administration is smashing records! Unfortunately, the only records their breaking will cause utter devastation to America: June was another record-setting month for illegal alien crossings at our southern border -- just like May before it. Our overworked, understaffed, and underappreciated Border Patrol has already made ONE MILLION arrests this year. The Biden Administration is on pace to allow more criminal illegal aliens to invade our country than EVER before, and I won’t sit idly by while that happens. [**That’s why I’m circulating my “Keep Building the Wall” petition for all American Patriots to sign, and demanding an end to the madness at our Southern border**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1f2aa38851&e=645b3b1338). What kind of country doesn’t have borders? A country that will eventually cease to exist. That’s the path we’re headed towards if we don’t take action right away to stop Biden’s record-breaking border crisis. It’s not just Mexican and Central American illegal aliens who are crossing illegally -- it’s unknown entities from all over the WORLD, who put our national security and national sovereignty at risk. The situation is almost too dire to describe, and that’s why I’m in urgent need of your support right away. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away, and tell the Biden Administration to do what’s right for the American people -- not the radical left and their activist groups**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=199c029fc0&e=645b3b1338). [**Right now, there is legal action pending that could help wall construction continue, and I need your signature on this petition as I do everything in my power to stop these disastrous open borders policies**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a88c886e31&e=645b3b1338). Illegal aliens drive down American wages. They take American jobs. They use the American welfare system. They refuse to assimilate, and instead bring their foreign languages and cultures here. We are importing the Third World, and that’s what we will get. Soon, America will be unrecognizable, unless we put a stop to this insanity. [**Put your foot down by signing my “Keep Building the Wall” petition today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=18346f4ee7&e=645b3b1338)**. ** [**After you sign, make sure you forward this message to all your patriotic friends, and ask them to sign it too. Let them know that the situation at the border is more dire than ever**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dc468078d7&e=645b3b1338)**. ** Unfortunately, fellow Patriot, many people here in Washington have given up on closing the borders. But I haven’t, and I never will. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip into my reelection campaign after you sign the petition](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0d4ccd2b77&e=645b3b1338). ** I have always been -- and will always be -- a leader in the border security fight, until they’re finally closed for good. **[You can help me stay in the fight with a generous contribution of $250, $100, or even $25 or $10 today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f2f28a8e9c&e=645b3b1338). ** Thank you for helping me stop the Biden Administration from breaking all the wrong records.
---
| Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4fec9c4b36&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District
**P.S.** The Biden Administration’s open borders disaster has us on pace for a record-setting year for illegal alien crossings. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away, and demand border security before America is overrun for good**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9164fcc43c&e=645b3b1338).

[**After you sign, make sure you chip into my reelection campaign so I can continue to battle for closed borders on Capitol Hill**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5032543467&e=645b3b1338).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, The Biden Administration is smashing records! Unfortunately, the only records their breaking will cause utter devastation to America: June was another record-setting month for illegal alien crossings at our southern border -- just like May before it. Our overworked, understaffed, and underappreciated Border Patrol has already made ONE MILLION arrests this year. The Biden Administration is on pace to allow more criminal illegal aliens to invade our country than EVER before, and I won’t sit idly by while that happens. . What kind of country doesn’t have borders? A country that will eventually cease to exist. That’s the path we’re headed towards if we don’t take action right away to stop Biden’s record-breaking border crisis. It’s not just Mexican and Central American illegal aliens who are crossing illegally -- it’s unknown entities from all over the WORLD, who put our national security and national sovereignty at risk. The situation is almost too dire to describe, and that’s why I’m in urgent need of your support right away. . . Illegal aliens drive down American wages. They take American jobs. They use the American welfare system. They refuse to assimilate, and instead bring their foreign languages and cultures here. We are importing the Third World, and that’s what we will get. Soon, America will be unrecognizable, unless we put a stop to this insanity. . . Unfortunately, fellow Patriot, many people here in Washington have given up on closing the borders. But I haven’t, and I never will. . I have always been -- and will always be -- a leader in the border security fight, until they’re finally closed for good. . Thank you for helping me stop the Biden Administration from breaking all the wrong records. | Yours in the fight, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District P.S. The Biden Administration’s open borders disaster has us on pace for a record-setting year for illegal alien crossings. . . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | Copyright © 2021 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
Peter, here’s what you need to know about the crucial Wisconsin Senate race right now:

**First,** Ron Johnson was endorsed by Donald Trump and received his full-throated support for re-election.

**Then,** Trump donors and allies flocked to Ron Johnson’s side and helped him outraise every Democrat in the race last quarter. The money he raised will no doubt be used on attack ads to tear down his opponents like Sarah Godlewski.

**Now,** it’s our job to raise as much money as possible from grassroots supporters like you to ensure we have enough resources to withstand these attacks and fight back.

**But,** July is a tough fundraising month, which means our donations have slowed this week. We’re concerned we may fall behind on our goal of reaching 10,000 individual donors by the end of the month. This is an important moment for our campaign.

[**So, we have to ask: Will you make a $5 contribution to Sarah Godlewski’s grassroots campaign before our July 31 deadline? Thanks for fighting with us, Peter. — Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, help us meet our grassroots supporter goal before the end-of-month deadline by making a donation today. | = If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, pleasemailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com. name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037299:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037298:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037300:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037301:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037302:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58037303:JSjqAXleN:m:1:3253819041:8199550CA0BF3103C0003B0D38B82F40:r)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, _let me tell you why._

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. [**I will need your support after I expose the truth about BLM, so please consider pitching in just $5 or $10 after you read my message.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dacb375a5cc64f678db0e6fa28118cf5&_e=YBYeoK3f0-4n-kggaHkWg6knbWRuhbETpGjeUtvXUa6O7Xo-NIQ8Ye1C6KGtJSxe8QbPyThi0iigxl9rDfbo-2tVIl-5PWDlwefMXqgiQEtupCbQ_qBO3dkbe-ddLJS0Mzfv7sh8vVtEUOX4xxyJcZBXnWbTrqWsq_tAm3UGriG4LRybqZKdD2MQJBPvPJ2HOtasNVHZhYyoiTCgqoLNiAmOXSmZtsoOXtjD_hDHaLVZYJxa3Q_VxYG1PXHGVJXBTsZwTK3a4kSUApYkPJNKAjbA2FR_1TLRBWO3qNvJrb4du9Uu5uE1ViFz3kPk1JQgXvXEaSJMhhae9sUARESa4UtRb2yslal_n-mHFvCU3L7M9Rv8wPsNKp_B4RtfNhHcodiF3bMwiozGOco7TvvfoWWt8Zg6XScS22e4q0qmB-dYz3vDzRH8WUgalvN2Yasn5THOUNreOQ2t2s4_7-z1rQ%3D%3D)

[**STAND UP TO BLM
ELECT A BLACK PATRIOT -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dacb375a5cc64f678db0e6fa28118cf5&_e=YBYeoK3f0-4n-kggaHkWg6knbWRuhbETpGjeUtvXUa6O7Xo-NIQ8Ye1C6KGtJSxe8QbPyThi0iigxl9rDfbo-2tVIl-5PWDlwefMXqgiQEtupCbQ_qBO3dkbe-ddLJS0Mzfv7sh8vVtEUOX4xxyJcZBXnWbTrqWsq_tAm3UGriG4LRybqZKdD2MQJBPvPJ2HOtasNVHZhYyoiTCgqoLNiAmOXSmZtsoOXtjD_hDHaLWWSnEVyvHpjwvEeYhyL5oaAxXi0djx8t2RepmvI56c8hwHrcXLdF5zLjPJc0ocd4L98J2nD7D4dauhJCj6DntSoPHMTdeKJW18f3Wtl4Pjz2O6x5YAYwf0F_m2NmBL6W-VpXxEQfKMOW14hqAHvQVFUYxU0dUKY3SBUsAePqFtjJ7zf71ZYP4q9qwuSzYaR1YXUHuaPHkQvb9GMdlshemAwproGE7fpD26jEuVKshsKA%3D%3D)
BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white.

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive.

Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a _‘symbol of hatred’_ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, _“When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.”_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dacb375a5cc64f678db0e6fa28118cf5&_e=YBYeoK3f0-4n-kggaHkWg6knbWRuhbETpGjeUtvXUa6O7Xo-NIQ8Ye1C6KGtJSxe8QbPyThi0iigxl9rDfbo-2tVIl-5PWDlwefMXqgiQEtupCbQ_qBO3dkbe-ddLJS0Mzfv7sh8vVtEUOX4xxyJcZBXnWbTrqWsq_tAm3UGriG4LRybqZKdD2MQJBPvPJ2HOtasNVHZhYyoiTCgqoLNiAmOXSmZtsoOXtjD_hDHaLVpCz0cHb-CpsT1sdC2qJQ3krUjmcbKYLaLmqzTU7A4SClEvzwz9eoNRdLdj7Rab2F5b-_ssXnrHZvwNpPMNA1cQ9Znua6MOqZPZBKam_YYQuFqyBMnOBaHCYMKMhNgr_u2cP5ZakbfeLCt5RWoS0XacEAHYZmEU_ZLVv12G9_gBfvdYHgAvH281LKVO5FjIvROg-pHeGctqGwYEFAh-_4cNbnBR7rLyopNLUCYrII6OQ%3D%3D)
I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women.

But the BLM organization uses _anything_ to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice.

[**We cannot allow them to take a symbol of freedom, the American flag, and turn it into a weapon for their agenda. We must stand up right now and fight back against their rhetoric.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dacb375a5cc64f678db0e6fa28118cf5&_e=YBYeoK3f0-4n-kggaHkWg6knbWRuhbETpGjeUtvXUa6O7Xo-NIQ8Ye1C6KGtJSxe8QbPyThi0iigxl9rDfbo-2tVIl-5PWDlwefMXqgiQEtupCbQ_qBO3dkbe-ddLJS0Mzfv7sh8vVtEUOX4xxyJcZBXnWbTrqWsq_tAm3UGriG4LRybqZKdD2MQJBPvPJ2HOtasNVHZhYyoiTCgqoLNiAmOXSmZtsoOXtjD_hDHaLW9te52PGgwKo512E45iHVhoQOCJE66nFROMUXmZprGBiDNPIlYbIyD3hV7RZIx5ZYLl0QmsbgOOsAPOH07oQqFhl_PzQW9Zymlqc812kB26_7baLV2LVbMV_dtfE6drFY9Ad1eu_GedMrtx4KDChsR5yVb5knO85OXoUpEmjeClJYpccxUvwmgxZkD3g1_ulbAQJjdF2cPmHnxQ-MrhI11yUj2zo36Da5QLnXqgRY3xQ%3D%3D)

Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities.

[**Please, if you are in the position to give, help me deliver the truth about BLM and the Democrats to the entire nation. With your help, we can make meaningful change in Washington and elect a strong black conservative to end the Democrats’ racist Republican narrative.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dacb375a5cc64f678db0e6fa28118cf5&_e=YBYeoK3f0-4n-kggaHkWg6knbWRuhbETpGjeUtvXUa6O7Xo-NIQ8Ye1C6KGtJSxe8QbPyThi0iigxl9rDfbo-2tVIl-5PWDlwefMXqgiQEtupCbQ_qBO3dkbe-ddLJS0Mzfv7sh8vVtEUOX4xxyJcZBXnWbTrqWsq_tAm3UGriG4LRybqZKdD2MQJBPvPJ2HOtasNVHZhYyoiTCgqoLNiAmOXSmZtsoOXtjD_hDHaLV9Qh2Bw_yKqG8YbdMnpzP92OnDuzZHm7JENyv6rCzi-TECsNHN1MjTvocsvjgtGPWf7DBt3zYoXsp-yirSLqsHAKnmi3YI5nT67mWtZzAs6tK5H2kQDs2CNG2jY-UEF-ew8ylr-DhJcbKIhSAfcu84BjUXY0dbo1FTckm1qvUzYdTzPhhzZFFH26ju-xMSj7XT7igJPtvXuqxqi_URAKVD5oTT7Qg3evL2EsXZAVzumg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization, let me tell you why. But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white. You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a ‘symbol of hatred’ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, “When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.” I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women. But the BLM organization uses anything to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice. Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

Derek, this is serious: **reproductive rights are under attack.**

Just this month, the Attorney General of Mississippi urged the Supreme Court to do away with _Roe v. Wade_ — _for good_.

And now, with an expanded conservative majority on the Court, reproductive rights for people across the country are under serious threat.

This issue has never been more pressing than it is right now, and we need to know: **do you support protecting reproductive rights?**

**We’re reaching out to you because you’re one of our most engaged supporters, and we need your response as soon as possible.** **[Will you add your name to our petition to show that you’re standing up for reproductive rights? We’re working hard to elect Democratic leaders in Virginia — and across the country — who will work hard to defend reproductive rights.

**But we _need to know_ that you’re standing with us on this critical issue.**

clean_body: I’m following up ONE LAST TIME. Without you on board before the big deadline, victory will slip away. Dear Friend, I read some troubling news — we need your help! The chairman of the Democratic Party launched a brand new scheme to funnel boatloads of cash into red-leaning swing states -- like Florida... To make matters EVEN WORSE , I just got word from House Republicans that they are about to fall critically short of their biggest fundraising deadline this year... If Republicans fail and miss this deadline, the consequences could be unthinkable. I'm asking for your support right now, Friend. I’m supporting a team of top GOP leaders before Democrats overwhelm us in must-win swing states. Mike Pence messaged you... Donald Trump Jr. messaged you... Kevin McCarthy messaged you... Newt Gingrich messaged you... Elise Stefanik messaged you... Steve Scalise messaged you... body:
TRUMP: Threatens to run for President if Republicans win back the House >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210729_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30&amount=15]
Trump just threatened a run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic Majority. And he’s launching his fundraising numbers in 48 hours to do it. I need a historic response -- 10,876 gifts in 48 hours -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s scheme as ex-President BACKFIRE. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210729_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30&amount=15]
I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment.

clean_body: The climate crisis is a growing concern in our community. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, Torrential rains and rising waters in the Great Lakes are threatening families in Ohio. It’s critical that we secure all of the resources and funding we need to combat the climate-related problems we are facing and enhance the Lake’s future. We can protect our environment and create good-paying jobs in wind, solar, and energy-efficient vehicles when we work together. [Will you sign our petition demanding that Congress include ambitious climate measures in the upcoming infrastructure package? We need[230] signatures from Ohio by July 31.]() | Our country needs ambitious climate measures in the new infrastructure deal that’s currently developing in Congress. We can’t afford to lose any more time to inaction -- we could save thousands of American lives every year if we protect our lands from forest fires, floods, erosion, and air pollution. Worsening climate change effects are already having dramatic impacts on regions and communities across the country. Together, we can make our nation more resilient, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. clean_body: Pressure builds to pardon Donald Trump: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. [ DEVELOPING [!]]( | | | This poll is registered to you and cannot be redistributed. Failure to respond will result in an automatic [YES] recorded. Please respond by 11:59 PM ]() Donald Trump broke the law time and time again. He abused his power to try and rig the 2020 election, and then he resisted the peaceful transfer of power earlier this year. | | | Please respond as soon as possible, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. clean_body: We just can’t trust him ... | | | = | | Derek, here’s what we know: Earlier this month, an undercover video revealed Glenn Youngkin admitting that he’s hiding his extreme anti-abortion stance so he doesn’t scare off potential voters. And then, he refused to debate Terry McAuliffe at the Virginia Bar Association on any of the issues that matter to Virginians. It makes me wonder ... What else is Glenn Youngkin hiding? This should terrify us, Derek. Reproductive health care is such an important issue for Virginia women and their families, and Glenn Youngkin can’t even be trusted to own up to his extreme right-wing stances. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The truth is, it’s never been more important to have a Governor committed to defending women’s reproductive rights and health care rights. We’re facing an ultra-conservative Supreme Court poised to repeal Roe v. Wade as soon as they get the chance. That means the Governor will be our last line of defense against anti-choice, anti-women legislation. And Derek, I know this much: we can trust Terry to be that defender. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Cecile Richards =** Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia
