name: Street for PA
subject: FWD: Pictures of progress in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
Because of your incredibly generous support over these past months, we have a real chance to hold the blue line in the U.S. Senate and make history by electing Sharif Street as the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania. | | Hey Peter, Because of your incredibly generous support over these past months, we have a real chance to hold the blue line in the U.S. Senate and make history by electing Sharif Street as the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania. But, we need _**your**_ help.

We need to make sure Pennsylvanians in every corner of the Commonwealth know how Sharif Street has been fighting for them as a state senator in Harrisburg, and why we so urgently need to send him to fight for us in Washington. [_**Can we count on you to chip in $20 toward our end of month goal, so Sharif can continue his road trip across Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33204135/298169850/-1329909551?refcode=E10447-20210729-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTMwN2VlYi1jNGYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJ9kLFIwd7vB1OyFFbTkSpqaf_Sv3aTIeAWzcRPnW2w=)

We are so incredibly grateful for the support you’ve already given this effort. **That’s why we’re sending you this message.** You’ve made it possible for Sharif to be crossing the Commonwealth, where his record of progress and problem solving, and a vision for the future based on sound policies and solutions, is being met with overwhelming enthusiasm and encouragement.

We’re halfway to our goal. We know you can help get us the rest of the way.

[_**Could you chip in $20 by the END OF TODAY, Peter?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33204136/298169851/-25160751?refcode=E10447-20210729-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTMwN2VlYi1jNGYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJ9kLFIwd7vB1OyFFbTkSpqaf_Sv3aTIeAWzcRPnW2w=) We’ve come so far. Let’s keep moving forward! \-- Street for PA

clean_body: We are inching closer and closer to the recall election. Under Newsom, business has run from California in massive numbers. Tesla. Oracle. Disney. Th Peter, We are inching closer and closer to the recall election. Under Newsom, business has run from California in massive numbers. Tesla. Oracle. Disney. They’re just headliners on a very long list of departures. But it’s not just businesses punching their tickets out of California, it’s families too. Families who were let down by Gavin Newsom’s failed policies and fed up with our unlivable tax situation. But who can blame them? It’s time we repair our state. IT’S NOW OR NEVER. We need to start by making a splash before the end of the month. My campaign is up against our biggest deadline yet... And if we’re going to fix California, we need the resources to WIN first. Thanks, Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

name: Erica Smith
subject: "We’re not Chick-fil-A"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind!!!
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
**In a moment, I’m going to give you an update from the road.** We just completed another leg of our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_ , and I could not be more excited to meet North Carolina voters in every corner of our beautiful state.
But first I have to respectfully ask: [**Will you please make your very first donation of just $5, $3, or even $1 to our campaign today? Our July fundraising deadline is on Saturday at midnight, and right now we’re still $1,723 behind.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)**
Okay, now onto the fun stuff. First stop: Piccolo’s Italian in Caldwell County, NC. I met the lovely Octavio, who’s owned the place for "44 years and two marriages."
"We’re not Chick-fil-A," Octavio said. "It’s not our pleasure. It’s yours."
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
Next stop, Person County. Here I am checking in from Roxboro, NC for the grand opening of the Person County Democrats office!
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
Finally, I had so much traveling to Rowan County for Farmer's Day on Saturday. I helped folks get registered to vote — and I won a zucchini racing contest!
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
**Y'all, we are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind!!!**
Together we can transform our politics and make this state work for all of us. And together, we can win bold, urgent changes like Medicare for All, reparations, universal broadband, a Green New Deal, and more.
[**But I simply can’t do it without grassroots online support from people like you. Can you please make your very first donation of just $5, $3, or even $1 to help raise the remaining $1,723 we need to meet our July fundraising deadline and fund the rest of our _100 Counties 100 Days Tour_?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7632?refcode=em20210729-295&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210729-295-footer&t=27&refcode2=295_3698_q4hiDO&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=295%2E3698%2Eq4hiDO)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Friend, I'll get right to it: **I need your help hitting our end-of-month goal before our midnight deadline – because the stakes are way too high for us to fall short now. **
Arizona Democrats – led by Latinx and Native American voters – fought hard to turn Arizona blue for the first time in decades and deliver the presidency and Senate majority for Democrats. But the GOP couldn't accept it. They immediately lashed out – trying to overturn the election results with a sham "election audit" and inviting extremists from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Donald Trump to defend it.
Watching Governor Ducey (R) allow this to happen – and then doubling down by signing a new voter suppression bill – has made it crystal clear to me that we _must_ defeat the extremism of today's GOP. His failed leadership is threatening so much of Arizona's potential – the potential I'm running to restore.
**But friend, the only surefire way to protect our democracy from more of this extremism and failed leadership is by flipping the governorship blue – and that depends on hitting every single fundraising goal. Right now though? We're still falling dangerously short of our goal, and time is running out.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says this race is a "toss-up" – meaning we can win – but Republicans are planning on spending MILLIONS to defeat us and keep this battleground red. That's why this deadline matters so much, and why I'm counting on your help.
**[Friend, we CAN defeat Republican extremism together – but only if grassroots supporters like you pitch in now. subject: Pelosi is having members of Congress arrested for following science
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND

Fellow Conservative, You’re receiving an urgent warning from House Conservatives Fund. Nancy Pelosi’s obsession with power and control is reaching new heights. Not only is she having vaccinated members of Congress sent to the Sergeant at Arms for not wearing masks, **N ow she's calling for vaccinated Congressional staffers and visitors to be _ARRESTED_ for not wearing masks in the Capitol.** How far is she going to go? First, she blocks true Republicans like Jim Banks from being on the Jan. 6th committee, now she’s ignoring science and threatening to arrest anyone who defies her. We can’t allow this to continue, Fellow Conservative. Hey Peter,

In just two days, our end of month deadline will elapse.**But right now, we’re not on track to reach our goal.**

body:
| | | ****[BREAKING: A brand new poll just revealed a STAGGERING 81% of Republicans believe Donald Trump should still influence the Republican Party. It's clear that Trump isn't going ANYWHERE -- and that the defeat of our House Majority is the first step in his return to the White House. That's why we're calling on 9,5OO grassroots Democrats to rush in $3 before our 48-hour End of Month Deadline to defend our House Majority. Can we count on you?](https://links.e.dccc.)** **

We need you to see this immediately.

**FIRST:**

After his HUMILIATING defeat, Donald Trump promised he'd be back.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

**THEN:**

A brand new poll just revealed that 81% of Republicans still believe he should have influence over the Republican Party -- _making Trump 's second run for president all but certain._

**SO NOW:**

**[We need to rise up in HISTORIC numbers to crush Trump's plans, defeat his Republicans, and protect our progress -- starting with our critical House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_6_)
2O21 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Make no mistake: Donald Trump and his fringe base still control the Republican Party.

**So we can be certain that if the GOP defeats our Democratic House Majority, Congress will be jam-packed with far-right Trump Republicans and QAnon conspiracists.**

Under no circumstances can we allow that to happen.

Our Democrats are the first line of defense against Republican schemes to suppress voting rights, slash Social Security, and gut affordable health care.

And if we lose our Democratic Majority, there's no telling what Trump's Republicans will do once they're back in power.

So it's on us to defend our House Democrats and prevent a total Republican takeover.

****[Before our End of Month Deadline hits in just 48 hours, can we count on you to rush in $3 to defend our House Majority, defeat House Republicans, and make Trump's plans completely backfire?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwpwmpM-)** **

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Today: DeSantis asks to overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | **Ron DeSantis asks Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade**
_Tampa Bay Times,_ July 29, 2021

Friend,

When the U.S. Supreme Court handed down Roe v. Wade in 1973, they were making a clear declaration: _a woman 's body belongs to her._

Ever since, the right to self-determination has been under relentless siege by abortion opponents -- and they've persuaded the Supreme Court to hear a case attempting to overturn a lower court's blocking of Mississippi's 15-week abortion ban. Gov. DeSantis is supporting them.

**Anti-choice advocates are using this case to _directly_ challenge Roe v. Wade's legality. If the Supreme Court rules in their favor, states could be given much greater leeway to ban abortion -- in any and all cases.

[Please add your name and join me in demanding that the Supreme Court protect a woman's right to choose.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zL2vMfM2DgMfdg0XbuS7pA==/9PoB7gIlK6t-Tai1Mbdo7w==)**

Let me be crystal clear: Every woman deserves the ability to decide what to do with her own body. End of discussion. But we all know Ron DeSantis won't protect a woman's right to choose; in fact, he's _already_ signed laws restricting abortion access in Florida.

That's antithetical to my beliefs. As Florida's 44th governor, I vetoed an anti-choice bill, and in Congress, I voted against a 20-week abortion ban. As your next governor, I will continue to defend reproductive rights -- no matter what.

**You have my word.

[I cannot be silent on this. Join me in calling on the Supreme Court to uphold Roe v. Wade.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zL2vMfM2DgMfdg0XbuS7pA==/9PoB7gIlK6t-Tai1Mbdo7w==) **

\-- Charlie Crist

| [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/zL2vMfM2DgMfdg0XbuS7pA==/V4p9k9DYp6RpDWBWV70rLA==?refcode=20210729_p_3_fl&amount=25)
---
****

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

clean_body: | | | | We need to stop big spending Friend, It’s no coincidence that the last time the National Average price of gas was above $3 was before 2016. The Democrats' policies are bad for business. We know when you are for Big Government you have a big spending wish list. And now all our wallets are feeling the cost of their spending. The Socialist Spending on “Green Policies”, un-realistic infrastructure packages, and padding their own pockets with pay raises, is what really hurts us. All this leads to a roller coaster ride of high inflation. The average American family can't afford it, but our cushy Democrat leaders who live in their Ivory Towers in Washington are taking your tax dollars. Even in Alaska, Senator Murkowski, who has an R next to her name, has been allowing Liberals in DC to walk through the front door of the Government's Bank! That is why I am running against her to fix our economy and cut spending. That’s why President Trump endorsed me! He knows we can fix the economy and bring back the Trump Tax Cuts! It’s time to take back the nation. Thanks, Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | =

name: Giffords.org
subject: Please, we need you to help us fight back against the NRA and NSSF
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Our July end of month fundraising deadline is coming up soon, so here are three things you need to know:
1\. The NRA and NSSF are working hard to reverse years of gun safety legislation and stop us from making progress on banning ghost guns and passing universal background checks.
2\. The House Appropriations Committee just approved $50M to double the federal investment in gun violence research at the CDC & NIH and approved a historic $200 million in new funding for community violence intervention programs across the country. But they still need to be approved by Congress.
3\. We’ve calculated that we need 10,000 contributions by Saturday to give us the resources we need to keep up the fight against the NRA and NSSF while we try to pass lifesaving legislation.
[**But we need your help. Will you make an $3 contribution today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal? The NRA and NSSF are working hard to reverse years of gun safety legislation and stop us from making progress on banning ghost guns and passing universal background checks. 2\. name: Murray HQ
subject: Two Trump-supporting opponents are running against Dr. Kim Schrier
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Dr. Kim Schrier was the FIRST Democrat ever elected in this district -- and in 2020, this was the closest congressional race in Washington state. We need all hands on deck to protect this Democratic seat.
#
Peter,
As you know, Senator Patty Murray is committed to defending our Democratic Senate seat in 2022. But our fight doesn’t end there. There are a number of crucial races up and down the ballot, including reelecting **Dr. Kim Schrier** in Washington’s purple 8th Congressional District.
After serving families as a pediatrician in Issaquah for almost 20 years, Dr. Schrier ran for Congress to ensure those same families had great, affordable healthcare, clean air and water, an excellent public education, and a shot at the American Dream. And that’s what she’s fighting for in D.C.
**[Dr. Kim Schrier was the FIRST Democrat ever elected in this district -- and in 2020, this was the closest congressional race in Washington state. We need all hands on deck to protect this Democratic seat. Rush in a $5 now to reelect this Democratic champion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33207530/298200524/-1582893118?refcode=pm_em_210729_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGIzMTQ0NS1kNmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK-NyA1JQyuiyCxybMKVsM6V2KkUnlr1onRAAaKSY2g=)**
**Here’s the latest on the race, Peter:**
Republicans are only _**FIVE SEATS**_ from taking back the House -- and two Trump-supporting opponents have already declared their campaigns to unseat Dr. Schrier in the 8th District.
The GOP think they can flip a blue seat red right here in Washington state. That’s why a dark money group is already dropping TV ads attacking Dr. Schrier for her work to lower prescription drug costs. But we’re not going to let the Republicans and special interests take back this seat.
In Congress, Dr. Schrier has worked hard to deliver real results for Washington state families.
She helped pass COVID-19 relief for families, including the expanded Child Tax Credit. She secured millions in infrastructure grants for projects across the district. And she introduced a bill to help make our communities more resilient to wildfires. And she’s not done making progress.
**But Dr. Schrier needs grassroots supporters like you to have her back in this fight:**
**[Pitch in $5 or whatever you can to keep Washington state blue in 2022 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33207531/298200525/-1582893118?refcode=pm_em_210729_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGIzMTQ0NS1kNmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK-NyA1JQyuiyCxybMKVsM6V2KkUnlr1onRAAaKSY2g=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33207532/298200528/-1582893118?refcode=pm_em_210729_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGIzMTQ0NS1kNmYwLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vK-NyA1JQyuiyCxybMKVsM6V2KkUnlr1onRAAaKSY2g=)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: I dedicate this email to every U.S. Senator who makes $174,000 a year and refused to vote to raise our national minimum wage of $7.25 an hour so workers might live with some dignity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Change my mind.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210729-2116-header&t=1&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)
_I dedicate this email to every U.S. Senator who makes $174,000 a year and refused to vote to raise our national minimum wage of $7.25 an hour so workers might live with some dignity._
---
Peter,
You don’t need an MBA to understand this: A minimum wage of $7.25 is great for giant corporations, but _devastating_ for the millions of Americans trapped in poverty while working for less than $15 an hour.
I will truly never understand how Republicans in the Senate, let alone some Democrats, can be OK with single mothers working for starvation wages. **Living in dignity isn’t political, and it’s long past time we raise the national minimum wage to *at least* $15 an hour.**
And make no mistake. Every penny a business pays below a minimum living wage is a penny YOU AS TAXPAYERS cough up for things like food, shelter, health care, child care.
In other words...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25573?refcode=em20210729-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)
If you agree with me that our nation’s minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is shitty, Peter, then know this: Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I promise I would be that 51st vote to raise it.
[**_But I need your help to get there. Can you please make your first donation of $5 or another amount to our campaign? We must close our $102,769 fundraising deficit before our big fundraising deadline on July 31._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25573?refcode=em20210729-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25573?refcode=em20210729-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)**
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. When it comes to our nation's economy, I think it's pretty clear: We don't have a labor shortage, we have a shitty wage surplus. [**_If you're with me and ready for more Democrats who actually vote like Democrats in the U.S. Senate, then please consider chipping in $5 or more right now to help reach our July goal._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25573?refcode=em20210729-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210729-2116-footer&t=24&refcode2=2116_434096_6aAo0l&akid=2116%2E434096%2E6aAo0l)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: Friend, Joe Biden has only been in office for 6 months and already he is undoing all the successes that President Trump had. Since he took office... Prices, from gas to groceries, have skyrocketed. A record number of illegal immigrants are flooding our Southern border due to Biden’s open door policies The far Left has forced their radical authoritarian agenda on the American people even more intensely than they ever have We can’t allow this to stand, Friend. President Trump’s legacy is getting chopped down and we can’t let the Democrats cause any more damage. President Trump worked too hard and too long to have all his successes upended by a pack of Socialists. Help us, Friend. ** Thank you, Mike Pompeo Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Dangerous precedent set by Speaker Pelosi...
body:
Texas Dems still haven't returned and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/15275c4621de/dangerous-precedent-set-by-speaker-pelosi?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## A radical precedent from the House this week...
Let me explain the series of events here: Speaker Nancy Pelosi created a committee to investigate the attack on the Capitol on January 6th, she then appointed 8 members to serve on this committee (including Republican Representative Liz Cheney), then when House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy nominated 5 Republican members to the committee Speaker Pelosi rejected 2 of them. Then:
So now every Democrat (and Reps. Cheney and Kinzinger) is on the record that the Speaker can solely who sits on committees and can overrule the minority leader.I hope that the Republicans remember this when they take back the House next year.
| | | |
---
## The latest from the Texas Dems...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=74100733ff&e=f6564bbe3b)
So the Texas Dems that bailed on doing their job, now want to discuss six bills. These bills could not advance or be voted on because they have failed to even show up because they are engaged in a taxpayer financed political stunt -- but don't worry, NBC will cover it seriously.
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Brother of top Biden advisor lobbied Executive Office of the President on behalf of GM](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6df5cde38d&e=f6564bbe3b) \- CNBCSince they committed to being the most transparent, let's see all the logs of how many meetings (and with who) Jeff Ricchetti has had in the WH.
|
---
[Sex offender arranged to smuggle child across border, DHS says](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fd62126327&e=f6564bbe3b) \- _The Washington Times_ This is just one of travesties that occur as result of open borders.
|
---
[Hunter Biden's art dealer said he wanted to be the 'lead guy in China' in 2015](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b4facc70fc&e=f6564bbe3b) \- Fox NewsThis is all and the up and up - right?
|
---
[As bullets fly in D.C., city leaders focus on ‘police reform’ — and offenders can breathe easy](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f3235f8b6f&e=f6564bbe3b) \- The Washington PostCrime is on the rise in most major cities (all run by Democrats)...what did they expect - if you defund the police and don’t punish criminals...
| | | |
---
## Thanks to our loyal viewers for making _Spicer & Co _the second most watched on Newsmax in July
| | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c201910a23&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cc503ee5e3&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
Got a great read for my week off this week. This book is by a professor who voted for Bernie Sanders, but still goes through and debunks story after story about Trump in the media. Check it out. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1eaf897cf7&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---

name: MarkKelly.com

body:
#

[**Friends — we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21&refcode=em210729-2-15?t=1&refcode2=1055_6688874_TPM_m5&akid=1055%2E6688874%2ETPM_m5)
Sorry to be so blunt, but our July fundraising deadline is on **Saturday** at midnight and we need a last-minute push to hit our 40,000 contribution goal.
Hitting this goal is so important because this month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And only a few days ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
We’re going to fight back against Trump and the flood of opponents rushing into this race - and we do that one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
**So as Trump and National Republicans swoop in to try and flip this seat, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21&refcode=em210729-2-15?t=2&refcode2=1055_6688874_TPM_m5&akid=1055%2E6688874%2ETPM_m5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210729-2-15&t=15&refcode2=1055_6688874_TPM_m5&akid=1055%2E6688874%2ETPM_m5)**

$5 at a time. That’s how we are going to overcome the massive amounts of influence and outside spending that is already pouring into this race.
It’s not going to be easy, but if we work together and pitch in where we can, we know we will succeed.
Thank you for being a part of this team!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210729-2-15&t=21&refcode2=1055_6688874_TPM_m5&akid=1055%2E6688874%2ETPM_m5)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=22&akid=1055%2E6688874%2ETPM_m5).

Peter, over the last six months the Biden administration has made their agenda clear.

**_Radicals first. America last. _**

And they’ll do anything they can to force their far-left agenda on our families, on our schools, and on our businesses.

I’m not going to stand by and let them continue taking us down this dangerous path. I’m standing up to DEFEND OUR FREEDOM and I want you to join me.

**[JOIN SARAH: DEFEND OUR FREEDOM NOW>>](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=88c23b8fa88343dea8bb856143877882&_e=6IYCWqHQ8VqRKIcyHmaObWAzx_CgUls05y-kU7gp_R9B6FEzmhsIfiZNrQfdmciRjA5p_ETyg50HDybGp6AkfRUGtPI0KGJcR3qZ4bcl5E2AuPARe0ALBfu9-rPU2kZ3NSvU6H-u6MG2sxnwNcROLxfhOnxrjLtwv5gIHGuiQTKeq8OSFhoSWP-aMs-SOC9FqZKsYUvi79w1w1toDNt-quzrQ_MGh1Okaw_EbqELYr0GpDAqn3qDxUMATxsYoHjkkF0SyWamimlABZXRjR9L_gzsM2IKN--ZbcKtzM7CLO1ETc3amvPQS6QpMhFql8ARU0JJI4KjYSvkcMw2nfGrGsOLgpiyHz9rYHBJAB6yim98EGFTP9BI8_XXGNnHMyNfXUas9WA9Tk1xp7YfiwltvcWo2rkQiBejjo86pwcF5H3slVDavU27_0G_6grrRfdY) **

Trust me, the liberal movement fears conservatives like us who will stand for what is right.

That’s probably why they’re running over $100,000 in ads against me. They’ll come after anyone who defends our values.

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.
clean_body: They’ll come after anyone who defends our values... | | Peter, over the last six months the Biden administration has made their agenda clear. Radicals first. America last. And they’ll do anything they can to force their far-left agenda on our families, on our schools, and on our businesses. I’m not going to stand by and let them continue taking us down this dangerous path. I’m standing up to DEFEND OUR FREEDOM and I want you to join me. Trust me, the liberal movement fears conservatives like us who will stand for what is right. That’s probably why they’re running over $100,000 in ads against me. They’ll come after anyone who defends our values. But we are stronger, Peter. And if we reach our $25,000 end-of-month goal for the DEFEND OUR FREEDOM FUND I know we’ll be in a good position to fight back. Will you chip in now to make sure we meet it? Thank you, Peter. Together, we can defend our freedom. \- Sarah | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Want to donate a different way? or mail a check: PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600. Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

clean_body: | | | | The "Green New Deal" is knocking on our door. How will we respond? Dear Peter, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey has been working to get the message out about the true disaster hidden away in the Senate's $3.5 trillion inflation-hiking, pork-bill: a so-called “clean” electricity standard to allow President Biden to advance his radical climate agenda. Biden’s climate policies would have CATACLYSMIC EFFECTS for both West Virginia and America. These policies would: Kill the coal industry Cut use of natural gas by 50 percent Aim to replace 100 million cars with electric vehicles in 8 years Force 58 million homes and 85% of commercial buildings to use electric heat instead of natural gas I'm standing up for America, and fighting back against these energy price-hiking and job-killing policies. I am working to keep our energy costs low and manufacturing jobs intact. | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 \- =

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Have you voted in this year's primary?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Washington State Closes the 2021 Primary on August 3rd
---
| Many people have asked, and I am running in next year's mid terms which will determine if we can keep/save our nation from the jaws of socialism, but this year's election (2021) is all about our local races: mayor, city and school board positions. It's these elected positions that have the most direct impact on our lives. On August 3rd, WA State closes the 2021 primary. The top winners in each race will advance to the general election in November.
We have many courageous candidates willing to represent our communities. Do you know who these people are on your ballot? Call them and ask questions. Their number is in the voter's pamphlet. Look up their website or Facebook page. Do your homework!
This past year we learned that elections really do have consequences. Do we want any more negative consequences?!
This year's election, called an odd-year election typically has the lowest voter turnout. The lowest! Yet it is this election that determines the leadership who will be deciding how much money you will be paying in local taxes, whether or not you have a police force, or if your child is taught critical race theory.
Our state legislature has made some pretty scary decisions of late that greatly affect the safety of our homes and our children.
When our state makes laws that infringe on our freedoms, harm our children, community or way of life we need to empower our city government to rise up and do the job the state is not doing. Our city and county councils can override this tyranny! They can protect our community.
As of today, with 5 days left to vote in this year's primary, only 13% of voters across our 3rd Congressional District have returned their ballots. In 2019 barely 30% of registered voters cast a ballot.
Friends!! We need to care about these elections!
If you haven't voted yet, find your ballot and cast your vote. Deadline is Tuesday, August 3rd.
Next year I am counting on you. Other great candidates are counting on you this year! I cannot do this without you.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Election Transparency
---
| Do you know about the information that is available in an attempt to keep our elections transparent?
Your ballot status: [Vote.wa.gov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00120d1eibPvc91KFk8CCOGFqZYLIqavfYCq6PvE-fU2zcTFy97bQg-9STVcvFBtUSQL981zkBAPnyQW4TP_CQCSnwdUsOXMhCcLHmXv314VcK3GgZ_tJEbCoE8SCygoVGU1tq8nYvqcTU=&c=BTSnyeGMrjrtAP060NXliEim2utlJj-n9M8UpwvUw4NbiU9584zYRw==&ch=tjsOjUJeAAcAJ9TueCfcRQ9vVjM4Uhcz2i-HBddgXzN6OA-WHEo8hw==)

| Make An Investment That Matters
Whether your investment is financial or one of time and energy (or both!) we want you to join our team of patriots. Host a fundraiser, sort t-shirts, work a fair booth, or help distribute signs. There are lots of ways to join the Heidi St. John for Congress team!

| America's Town Hall
Last Friday, Sheriff's Deputy Jeremy Brown was killed while on duty in Vancouver, Washington. We must end the shameful narrative that the Democrats continue to use to erode public confidence in our LEO's. Also, I'll be addressing the question of Unions from a listener.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Washington State Closes the 2021 Primary on August 3rd | Many people have asked, and I am running in next year's mid terms which will determine if we can keep/save our nation from the jaws of socialism, but this year's election (2021) is all about our local races: mayor, city and school board positions. It's these elected positions that have the most direct impact on our lives. On August 3rd, WA State closes the 2021 primary. The top winners in each race will advance to the general election in November. We have many courageous candidates willing to represent our communities. Do you know who these people are on your ballot? Call them and ask questions. Their number is in the voter's pamphlet. Look up their website or Facebook page. Do your homework! This past year we learned that elections really do have consequences. Do we want any more negative consequences?! This year's election, called an odd-year election typically has the lowest voter turnout. The lowest! Yet it is this election that determines the leadership who will be deciding how much money you will be paying in local taxes, whether or not you have a police force, or if your child is taught critical race theory. Our state legislature has made some pretty scary decisions of late that greatly affect the safety of our homes and our children. When our state makes laws that infringe on our freedoms, harm our children, community or way of life we need to empower our city government to rise up and do the job the state is not doing. Our city and county councils can override this tyranny! They can protect our community. As of today, with 5 days left to vote in this year's primary, only 13% of voters across our 3rd Congressional District have returned their ballots. In 2019 barely 30% of registered voters cast a ballot. Friends!! We need to care about these elections! If you haven't voted yet, find your ballot and cast your vote. Deadline is Tuesday, August 3rd. Next year I am counting on you. Other great candidates are counting on you this year! I cannot do this without you. | | | | | Election Transparency | Do you know about the information that is available in an attempt to keep our elections transparent? Your ballot status: == Statewide ballot returns data: == WA State Matchbacks shows every ballot that has been returned so far. == | | | | Make An Investment That Matters Whether your investment is financial or one of time and energy (or both!) we want you to join our team of patriots. Host a fundraiser, sort t-shirts, work a fair booth, or help distribute signs. There are lots of ways to join the Heidi St. John for Congress team! | | | == | | | == | | | | == | America's Town Hall Last Friday, Sheriff's Deputy Jeremy Brown was killed while on duty in Vancouver, Washington. We must end the shameful narrative that the Democrats continue to use to erode public confidence in our LEO's. Also, I'll be addressing the question of Unions from a listener. | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

subject: Following up on a "trend"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
In a minute, [**I'm going to ask you to chip in toward a critical end-of-month goal for our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210729?refcode=em20210729-504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=504_420207_3uueXQ&akid=504%2E420207%2E3uueXQ) But before I do, I wanted to follow up on my email from a couple of weeks ago about a tough trend we see in grassroots fundraising during the summer months.
Fundraising, especially the small-dollar donations Pramila relies on, really slows down in July and August. In fact, _we’re a full 47% behind on grassroots fundraising compared to last month._ **And that couldn’t be happening at a worse moment with Pramila’s fight for working families at a critical point.**
Pramila’s fight to end the filibuster and pass historic voting rights legislation is up against a mid-August deadline — if we don’t pass the For The People Act by then, experts say these voting and democracy reforms cannot be implemented before the 2022 midterm elections. If Democrats don’t pass this bill, Republican voter suppression measures and partisan gerrymandering could hand the GOP control of the U.S. House.
And that’s just one of the crucial fights Pramila is leading on. She’s working to expand Medicare in the fight for Medicare for All. She’s working to combat climate change in the fight for a Green New Deal. She’s working to go big, bold, and fast on this next big spending bill so we can deliver for working people.
[**Pramila needs your support at this critical time in her fight to transform this country so it finally works for working people. Can you chip in $3 during these slow summer months to boost our fundraising and help us catch up?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210729?refcode=em20210729-504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=504_420207_3uueXQ&akid=504%2E420207%2E3uueXQ) _We set a goal to bring in 2,000 donations before the end of July, so each contribution helps us hit our goal:_
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210729?refcode=em20210729-504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=504_420207_3uueXQ&akid=504%2E420207%2E3uueXQ)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Lauren
Lauren Lalonde
Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210729-504-footer&t=23&refcode2=504_420207_3uueXQ&akid=504%2E420207%2E3uueXQ)**

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: We DESERVE Safe Communities.
body:
That's why we need to take back the majority! [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-r/) Fellow Patriot, Actions have consequences, and the Democrats' embrace of "Defund the Police" has caused a nationwide surge in crime.
* In Minneapolis, homicides are up 50% compared to last year.
* In Chicago, dozens of people are shot every weekend, and residents fear for their lives.
* In our nation's capital, shootings and gang violence are a daily occurrence -_ even next to their downtown baseball stadium!_

**Here in Wisconsin, Milwaukee is a terrifying example of hometown violence right next door - crime is up 45% overall. Homicides are up. Thefts are up 42%, motor-vehicle thefts are up 194%, and overdoses are on track for a record high.**If you agree that we DESERVE to have safe communities - _and that we can't afford for this violence to spread any further_ - please, step up and join me! [Will you **JOIN ME, before the end of THIS MONTH, **to fight back against the anti-police, pro-criminal Democrats?](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-y/) [JOIN US BEFORE JULY 31: Defend Our Communities!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-t/) Last year, the Democrats rallied across the country to **DEFUND THE POLICE.** They encouraged violence and open disrespect of our law enforcement, and thanks to them, police officers are retiring in droves. In Milwaukee, 68 officers will have retired by the end of this year, and the city cut 120 positions out of the budget.Now they're SHOCKED that crime is spiking.First, we need to [HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-i/). Second, we need to [TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-d/) so they can't do any further damage to our country and our communities!-Glenn Grothman | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cmiudl-yddjllujiu-h/)
---

name: John Kasich
subject: Making a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Our hard work is making a difference. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f53ada0509de4723a5385be8d2103ad4&_e=PfeXLBA_I1PJOZKNcdnBFcc_Q7IzVMkaVpd2GB_vokjvjDwRAvDrvSlHuqsl-KZPORMCj-CyxithI4aJdqu9-9FQqCPId3F_bNqpwnTYNj1osYCz0AXmA7GLJb_g2kZ8JOxcU3jJFliMiwZ4EwkbnlrXqLvwT7vU3pRv0g_w2RuZFuxq2CppRYUm4pdQ6x3rUcGk1YlPVpubL6lQe_RL4YvDHQBqT-WPlhdtdiWUrgcC_Y7HZ6slr11DJcWz5lELr1lej6kx7bRpqdjAuZEuSQ%3D%3D) Peter - If you turn on the news this week, one of the big items you'll see is that Republicans and Democrats are getting much closer to passing a bipartisan infrastructure bill in Congress. Those Senators deserve the credit for their good-faith efforts to find a compromise but our hard work pushing for this is making a difference too. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. Our kids and grandchildren are counting on us to fix what's so broken in D.C. [**We have an important fundraising deadline on Saturday**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f53ada0509de4723a5385be8d2103ad4&_e=PfeXLBA_I1PJOZKNcdnBFUQmLwbd-C7NqsbxE5qkUp1K09e4-gp6y09otKUe7Hy-U3uKIHIXGsH-t2rNu8_WLx6ppYapbXc87_Qki1IyigyR4v-Zr1n6bdSNJdJ6gq1cl3Ur7qf6H8HxV91jlW22rUlB8iHBy8rb2acg0cee_aNP5Q8QlJGw0pZFv4vPZFFyrU2JhSUUCau9egqDHzgIWQB_1Dj34QxELLD8boiX43gZ_pJKyvX3qFnaayAbg-HyIh_7O6VRk5p5ifg6-sRwoA%3D%3D) and could use your help to keep up the momentum. The funds we raise go directly into the advocacy activities that are rallying support for these bipartisan actions for our country. clean_body: Our hard work is making a difference. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. Peter - If you turn on the news this week, one of the big items you'll see is that Republicans and Democrats are getting much closer to passing a bipartisan infrastructure bill in Congress. Those Senators deserve the credit for their good-faith efforts to find a compromise but our hard work pushing for this is making a difference too. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. Our kids and grandchildren are counting on us to fix what's so broken in D.C. and could use your help to keep up the momentum. The funds we raise go directly into the advocacy activities that are rallying support for these bipartisan actions for our country. I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and restore our Republican Party to a coalition formed around ideas for the future. We can do it, together. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210729-2304-header&t=1&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)
We know the next election is still a ways off, but this whole idea that you only need to campaign in an election year is one reason why Democrats have fallen short. We cannot organize, phone bank, host community events, and share important conversations with our neighbors _only when it’s time to vote_.
History shows us that organizing _365 days a year_ is what it takes to make big, systemic change. That’s why we’re investing in keeping organizing staff on the ground, continuing volunteer work year-round, and building momentum for our progressive movement across the country,**and why we need to fundraise all year round to support our ongoing work.**
**Your support is the reason why our movement has grown to where it is today, and we couldn’t be more grateful. But we can’t slow down now. Based on our average gift, we need 7,500 contributions to make up our fundraising gap for July and have the resources we need to carry out our plans (which you can read about below).**
[We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Can you please rush a donation of $16.61 (our average gift this month) to power the one-to-one organizing that grows our progressive movement? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210729-2?refcode=em20210729-2304-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2304_2526796_pq2FC0&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)
**[Chip in $16.61](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210729-2?refcode=em20210729-2304-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2304_2526796_pq2FC0&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)**
Here are some of the ways that AOC, you, and our movement are organizing to build progressive power nationwide:
* Last week, we launched in-person canvasses to talk to community members about the Green New Deal and the proposed fracked gas power plant in our district. Each week, we recruit and train canvassers to have deep, meaningful conversations with potential voters to clear up misconceptions and find common ground. So far we’ve already knocked on 250 doors!
* Last weekend, Alexandria traveled to Ohio to knock on doors and get out the vote for Nina Turner, a progressive champion running for Congress.
* Alexandria was recently appointed to the new Select Committee on Economic Disparity & Fairness in Growth which aims to address wealth inequality in our nation. She’ll be in charge of tackling generational disparities and increasing worker power in the economy.
* Alexandria is working with her progressive colleagues in the House to withhold their votes on the bipartisan infrastructure bill unless a budget bill that includes climate measures, child care, and immigration reform passes at the same time.
* Through our Homework Helpers tutoring program, our team has trained and connected tutors with over 400 families to support students who need extra help, especially during the transition to remote learning.

None of this work would be possible without your support. Your continued involvement is critical to growing our programs and implementing our progressive agenda. Right now, we’re hoping to collect 7,500 more donations to make up our fundraising gap so we can continue funding this ambitious work.
[If you’re able to, please chip in today and be one of the 7,500 people we need to hit our July fundraising goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210729-2?refcode=em20210729-2304-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&refcode2=2304_2526796_pq2FC0&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210729-2?refcode=em20210729-2304-P&t=6&refcode2=2304_2526796_pq2FC0&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210729-2304-P&t=7&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2304%2E2526796%2Epq2FC0)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Socialism is a sneaky and worrisome epidemic and to make matters worse, I just received word that AOC and Pelosi are arranging a far-left candidate to run against me. Usually, this would not worry us, but they are also planning on spending millions to lie about my record and smear me with false accusations.

**AOC + PELOSI = SOCIALIST POLICIES FOR IOWA**
